title: Sales Rep - Account Executive
description:
*Do not reach out to the website - only applications submitted via OnlineJobs will be considered*



West Village Interior (
) is a high-end interior design firm serving offices, retail stores and homeowners in New York City. We specialize in transforming spaces with luxury designs, tailored aesthetics, and expert craftsmanship. Our clientele includes realtors, homebuilders, contractors, and property developers who seek high-quality interior design solutions. We are looking for a high-energy, results-driven Sales Development Representative  to generate leads, build relationships, and close sales with NYC-based clients.



What You’ll Be Doing

1. Make 20-30 outbound calls per day to NYC-area real estate professionals.

2. Follow up with warm leads to book design consultations.

3. Maintain a structured pipeline using CRM tools to track leads, calls, follow-ups, and closed deals.

4. Conduct 30-40 design consultations per month through direct outreach and follow-ups.

5. Build strategic referral partnerships with NYC-based realtors, contractors, and home stagers.

6. Convert leads into 2-4 closed sales per month, with project sizes ranging from $5,000 - $25,000.



What We’re Looking For

1. 3+ years of experience in sales, real estate, home services, or interior design sales.

2. Strong ability to sell high-ticket services to affluent clients.

3. Fluent in English with a neutral or American-accented tone.

4. Ability to build trust with NYC homeowners and handle objections effectively.

5. Self-motivated and results-driven, comfortable with a commission plus salary role.

6. Familiarity with CRM tools, cold-calling software, and lead-tracking systems.

7. Comfortable using
, LinkedIn, and online communities for lead generation.

8. Must be available to work NYC business hours (9amET - 5pmET).



Compensation & Earnings Potential 

This role includes a reasonable base salary for stability while still offering uncapped commissions. Salary of $1k-$1.5k plus commissions of $500-$1.5k per month, averaging $1.7k to $2.5k per month total.



Why Join Us?

- Team is already doing 3+ closes per month with no salespeople.

- Fully remote work with flexible scheduling, selling in a thriving NYC market.

- Unlimited earning potential with no salary caps.

- Support and training provided, including call scripts, sales training, and marketing materials.



To be considered you must submit a voice recording, resume and portfolio if available.

description:

Young Publisher | 
/



We’re an international digital publishing company hiring from the Philippines for over 5 years.

We have 50+ tea
mbers worldwide and 200+ verified reviews with a 4.9 average rating.

We build long-term partnerships, not short-term gigs.

We don't disappear, we pay on time



We’re looking for an experienced direct response copywriter who can:

- Take full ownership of performance-driven campaigns

- Write
s that get opened, read, and clicked

s and automated sequences

title: VIDEO EDITIOR - VA - (CapCut & AI Voiceovers) - Stable, Long-Term!
description:
Are you a talented, fast-paced video editor looking for a stable, long-term home?



I am looking for a highly creative Video Editor to join our growing content team! We produce viral, scroll-stopping TikToks and Reels using AI-generated B-roll. We already have a VA generating the raw B-roll clips for us—your job will be to take those raw clips, generate realistic AI voiceovers, and edit everything together into an engaging, fast-paced final video.



If you are a CapCut intermediate / pro level who understands social media pacing, retention editing, and audio syncing, I want you on my team for years to come! We value our tea
mbers and provide great support and a stable income.



Our Hiring Process:

Because video editing is a "show, don't tell" skill, we require a practical Trial Task instead of just reading cover letters. We want to see your actual editing skills!



Step 1: The Trial Task (MANDATORY)

Please click the Google Doc link below for your instructions. It will guide you on how to generate the AI voiceover and edit 2 short trial videos.





Step 2: Submit Your Work

Once you have edited the 2 videos, upload them to a Google Drive folder and include the link in your application message right here on OnlineJobs.ph!



A Quick Note on Attention to Detail:

As mentioned in the Google Doc, please make sure your 2 videos are numbered 1 and 2, and double-check that your Google Drive link is set to "Anyone with the link can view." If the folder is locked, we will instantly reject the application because we cannot review your work!

title: Shopify CRO & Landing Page Specialist (Remote)
description:
Type: Independent Contractor (Full-Time or Part-Time)

Working Hours: CET Business Hours (Germany), Monday to Friday

Client Location: Munich, Germany



About the Client:

We are a high-performance marketing agency based in Munich, Germany, currently building our CRO department from scratch. We work with a diverse range of eCommerce brands—from smaller shops needing foundational trust and AOV improvements to large-scale brands doing €10M+/year where every data-driven change has a massive revenue impact.



About the Role:

We are looking for a Shopify CRO & Landing Page Optimization Specialist who thinks in revenue, not just aesthetics. We value impact over job titles; whether you are a highly-motivated Junior or a seasoned Senior, we care about your ability to explain strategy, execute tests, and move the needle on CVR and AOV.



This role is unique: You will manage client eCommerce stores, but you may also work internally on our B2B funnels (Lead magnets, VSLs, and booking pages). We want a "solution-bringer" who helps us define the tech stack and processes for this new department.



You will be responsible for:

- eCommerce CRO: Optimizing PDPs, listicles, advertorials, and checkout flows to increase Revenue per Visitor.

- B2B Optimization: Improving internal funnels for lead opt-ins and booked meetings.

- Strategic Communication: Recording clear Loom audits to explain the "why" behind your optimizations.

- Data-Driven Testing: Moving from hypothesis to test to iteration.



Must-Have Skills & Experience:

- Strong Shopify Expertise: Deep hands-on experience with the platform.

- Conversion Focus: Proven results improving CVR, AOV, or Funnel metrics.

- Psychology & Design: Understanding of buying psychology and modern Western design standards.

- Commercial Mindset: Ability to prioritize tasks based on revenue impact, not just "looking pretty."

- Tech Versatility: Experience with page builders, bundling apps, and heatmapping tools (you tell us what’s best!).



How to Apply, please complete this form:





Note: This role is NOT for "task-takers" or "app-installers." We are looking for a strategic partner to help us build a department. If you think in testing frameworks and funnel leverage, we want to meet you.

You are looking for a stable, daytime role that allows you to provide for your family while growing with a promising U.S. startup.

Stability: Direct collaboration with the Founder with a long-term career path.



Impact: As the first employee, your contribution will directly shape the future of the company.

title: SENIOR VIRTUAL ASSISTANT – OPERATIONS & PHONE SUPPORT
description:

This can already be full-time

Very important: if you are interested please leave a voice recording so we can evaluate your English.

title: Corporate Sales Manager – Real Estate Solutions
description:
Job Position is BASED IN SINGAPORE




.sg



Full job description : 



Start Something Purposeful. 



At Urban Space Group , we believe in creating concepts that allow people, business and purpose to come together and thrive. We’re a privately owned real estate group dedicated to real estate concepts for industrial and commercial spaces. We are both owners of industrial properties, commercial shophouses and spaces, as well as operators of business models and concepts such as urbanspace self storage, Urbanpod workspace etc. 



We actively invest to expand our asset portfolio and grow our industrial and shophouse asset management capabilities and offerings.  



We’re looking for a Business Development and Sales Manager to bring our asset investment and management services to our clients, partners and stakeholders. 



Why Join Acuvest :



Your Mission :



To be part of the team to grow our asset portfolio and drive performance through innovations and teamwork. 



This is a full-stack business development and sales role with plenty of room to use your skillsets in sales, strategy, innovation and execution. You’ll lead a motivated team and collaborate closely with other departments. You will report to the Business Development / Sales Director and play a critical role in the company’s performance. 



Why Join us :



- Mentored by management of a company with decades of experience in investment management, property management, development, and self-storage solutions across Singapore and the region. We combine strategic insight with innovation, offering real opportunities to grow and make an impact across a diversified real estate portfolio.



- Build an Elite Network: Connect directly with a high-value network of Corporate and SME business leaders / decision-makers, building a powerful network for your long-term career success. 



- Thrive in a High-Growth Self-Storage Sector. Our self-storage business, Co-working business space, E-commerce fulfilment hubs, serve both individual and corporate clients with flexible space solutions in a fast-rising market. You’ll be at the forefront of lead generation, networking, and deal closing—driving measurable results in an expanding industry.



- Collaborative Culture. Real Career Progression. Work with experienced professionals across property and investment teams, gain exposure to full deal cycles, build strong client relationships, and accelerate your career in sales and business development at Acuvest.



Full job description : What you will be doing



Property Leasing : 



- Develop and implement leasing strategies and initiatives to maximize occupancy, rental income, and tenant satisfaction 



- Identify leasing opportunities and prospective tenants that align with the positioning and target market of each property, and develop relationships with tenants and prospective tenants. 



- Negotiate lease agreements, including terms and conditions, rental rates, lease incentives, and lease renewals, and ensure compliance with company policies and industry standards. 



- Collaborate with property management teams to conduct market research and analysis, assess competitive landscape, and identify trends and opportunities in the property market. 



- Develop and maintain leasing budgets, forecasts, and reports, and track leasing activity, occupancy rates, and financial performance against targets and benchmarks. 



- Manage tenant relations and communication, including addressing tenant inquiries, resolving disputes, and ensuring tenant compliance with lease terms and property rules and regulations. 



- Represent the company at industry events, trade shows, and networking opportunities to promote our properties and attract potential tenants and partners. 



Self storage sales : 



- Work closely self storage sales team and management on drive the sales and occupancy of our self storage business. 



Property Investment : 



- Work closely with Management team to develop business opportunities for new property investment and development projects on a project basis. 



- Unlock Potential: Identify underutilized properties and devise creative strategies to maximize their value and utility



Requirements : Who we are looking for.



- Strong business acumen and a strategic mindset. Enterprenuerial mindset 



- An outgoing, optimistic personality with exceptional interpersonal skills. Strong networking and interpersonal skills. 



- The ability to communicate confidently and effectively at all levels. Excellent communication skills, with the ability to build relationships and influence stakeholders at all levels. 



- Minimum of 5 years of experience working experience. 



- Strong understanding of leasing principles, market dynamics, and negotiation strategies in the real estate industry. 



- Proven track record of successfully negotiating lease agreements, driving occupancy, and achieving leasing targets and goals. 



- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to analyze market data, evaluate leasing opportunities, and make data-driven decisions. 



- Results-oriented mindset with a focus on driving leasing outcomes and delivering exceptional customer service to tenants and partners. 



- Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment. 



- An eagerness to learn and grow through hard work and dedication

title: Education Franchise Business Development Manager
description:
Business Development Executive

Franchise & Licensing Growth  •  Remote  •  Full-Time



Department	Franchise & Licensing

Reports To	Head of Partnerships / CEO

Location	Remote (anywhere) — occasional travel may be required

Employment Type	Full-Time

Experience Required	Minimum 2 years in B2B sales, business development, or education industry



ABOUT RIPPLE CREATE

Ripple Create is a coding and robotics academy dedicated to nurturing the next generation of innovators, aged 5 to 18. Through hands-on, curriculum-aligned programmes, we empower young learners to design, build, and code — preparing them for a technology-driven future. We are rapidly expanding our reach through franchise and licensing partnerships across the region and beyond.



ROLE OVERVIEW

We are looking for a driven and self-motivated Business Development Executive to lead the growth of our franchise and licensing network. In this remote-based role, you will own the full partnership lifecycle — from generating and qualifying leads through marketing channels, to nurturing prospects, coordinating technical demonstrations, closing agreements, and supporting new partners through their first six months of operation. This is a high-impact, end-to-end commercial role ideal for someone with a passion for education and a proven track record in consultative sales.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Lead Generation & Marketing Channel Management

•	Manage and optimise franchise and licensing marketing portals, listings, and digital channels (e.g. franchise directories, social media, paid ads,
 campaigns).

•	Monitor inbound enquiries across all channels and respond promptly to maintain lead 
ntum.

•	Work with the marketing team to develop compelling collateral and messaging targeting prospective franchisees and licensees.



CRM Management & Lead Administration

•	Accurately enter, update, and maintain all leads and prospect interactions in the CRM system in a timely manner.

•	Track pipeline stages, flag at-risk leads, and maintain a clean, up-to-date database.

•	Generate regular reports on lead volume, conversion rates, and pipeline health for management review.



Lead Nurturing, Qualification & Sales Process

•	Proactively nurture prospects through personalised outreach, follow-up calls,
s, and virtual meetings.

•	Qualify leads against defined criteria (financial capacity, market fit, operational readiness) to prioritise pipeline.

•	Guide prospects through the sales journey, addressing objections and providing relevant information and case studies.

•	Coordinate and schedule technical demonstrations with the Sales Trainer, ensuring prospects are well-prepared and engaged.

•	Follow through on all stages of the deal process, working collaboratively toward signed agreements.



Post-Sales Partner Support (First 6 Months)

•	Serve as the primary point of contact for new franchise and licensing partners from signing through the first six months of operations.

•	Coordinate onboarding activities, training schedules, and resource access with internal teams.

•	Proactively check in with partners to resolve issues, gather feedback, and ensure a smooth launch.

•	Facilitate a structured handover to the Account Manager at the end of the six-month post-sales period.



REQUIREMENTS

•	Experience: Minimum 2 years of experience in B2B sales, business development, franchise development, or a related field; experience in the education sector is a strong advantage.

•	Sales Acumen: Demonstrated ability to manage a full sales cycle from lead generation to closing, with a consultative, relationship-first approach.

•	CRM Proficiency: Hands-on experience using CRM platforms (e.g. HubSpot, Salesforce, Zoho, or similar); disciplined in data entry and pipeline management.

•	Communication: Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English; ability to adapt tone and style for diverse stakeholders.

•	Organised & Self-Directed: Highly organised with strong time management skills; comfortable managing multiple prospects and tasks independently in a remote environment.

•	Tech Savvy: Comfortable with digital marketing channels, video conferencing tools, and productivity software.

•	Passion for Education: Genuine interest in children’s education, STEM, or technology learning programmes.



NICE TO HAVE

•	Experience in franchise development, licensing, or channel partnerships.

•	Background or network in the K-12 education, enrichment, or EdTech space.

•	Familiarity with coding, robotics, or STEM-related products or curricula.

•	Multilingual abilities to engage prospects across different markets.



WHAT WE OFFER

•	A fully remote, flexible work arrangement with a results-driven culture.

•	A meaningful role contributing to the growth of quality STEM education globally.

•	Competitive base salary with performance-based commissions and incentives.

•	Supportive team, clear processes, and the tools you need to succeed.

•	Opportunities for career growth as the franchise and licensing network expands.



HOW TO APPLY

Send your CV and a brief cover letter explaining why you’re excited about this role. Please include the subject line: “BD Manager — Franchise & Licensing”. We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Client Concierge Coordinator
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

The Client Concierge Coordinator serves as a pivotal support role for clients attending our Essentials Workshops and other Cardone Ventures events. This individual is responsible for ensuring that every client has a seamless and remarkable experience from the 
nt of purchase through event attendance. The role includes managing communications, conducting welcome calls, coordinating event scheduling, and providing customer service support via
, phone, and other communication channels. This person will proactively handle client needs, such as confirming event attendance, addressing concerns, and upselling additional seats or tickets. 



This will be a contract position only of 3-6 months



This position is 100% remote.



ABOUT CARDONE VENTURES

Our mission is to help business owners achieve their personal, professional, and financial goals through the growth of their businesses. We work in dozens of verticals and provide strategic business guidance through courses, live events, partnerships, and investments. Our core values are the backbone of our business and guide our hiring process: we are inspirational, accountable, transparent, disciplined, aligned, and results oriented. This company operates nationally and is growing by the day.



Wondering what it's like to work here? Come check this:


/watch?v=PIIv7sYj1Ns



SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

Driving an increase in client engagement and event participation by effectively managing communications and follow-ups to ensure high attendance rates, upselling additional seats or tickets, and maximizing event participation



OBJECTIVES

- Manage post-sale client interactions to confirm ticket payments and ensure attendance at purchased events.

- Audit pre-event task completion and manage reminders to ensure clients are ready for their events.

- Assist the Client Concierge Manager in resolving client concerns, answering queries, and enhancing client satisfaction.

- Facilitate event scheduling, including follow-ups with clients who have not scheduled their attendance and rescheduling as necessary.

- Upsell additional event tickets or seats by effectively using sales scripts tailored to various Cardone Ventures events and workshops.

- Build trust and maintain positive client relationships through open and interactive communication.

- Manage various client communications platforms, including HubSpot, Asana, G-Suite, Slick Text, and Aloware, ensuring timely responses and accurate information sharing.

- Monitor and manage und
 calls and tasks, marketing responses, and communication blasts to drive client engagement.

- Support with scrubbing and managing deals related to 10X360 and Essential Workshops to ensure accurate tracking and client follow-up

- Ensure response times to client inquiries are within a 24-hour window, maintaining a high standard of customer service.



COMPETENCIES

- Proven experience in de-escalating client situations while maintaining a positive representation of the Cardone Ventures brand.

- Proficiency in HubSpot, Asana, and G-Suite tools (Sheets, Documents, Gmail, Calendars, Slides).

- Strong communication skills with the ability to memorize and effectively utilize essential sales scripts.

- High level of business acumen to engage with business owners and understand their needs.

- Capable of executing process improvements to streamline client communications and event coordination.

- Ability to manage and prioritize multiple tasks, including daily priority meetings, pre-event qualifications, and managing client communications across multiple platforms.



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

- At least 2 years’ experience in a customer service role in a professional environment



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

- Prolonged periods sitting at a desk and working on a computer



COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY

As an equal opportunity employer committed to meeting the needs of a multigenerational and multicultural workforce Cardone Ventures recognizes that a diverse staff, reflective of our community, is an integral and welcome part of a successful and ethical business. We hire local talent at all levels regardless of race, color, religion, age, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation or disability, and actively foster inclusion in all forms both within our company and across interactions with clients, candidates and partners.



If this position caught your eye, send us your resume! For best consideration, please complete the online application form:


/

title: Ad Creative Specialist
description:
Job description - Ad Creative Specialist



Our e-commerce company is hiring! We are looking for a full-time E-Commerce Ad Creative specialist to join our team, someone with a thorough understanding of Dropshipping through Shopify and paid advertising. You will make sure that our ad creatives are optimized for conversions and match our product description and quality.



What does an Ad Creative VA do?

An ad creative VA is mainly responsible for creating Advertising creatives for social media advertising. This involves product photo and video editing. This may also involve helping to improve older listings to maximize sales. Marketing skills are required!



Responsibilities and Duties

* Creating new ad creatives for our dropshipping products: in Danish and Swedish.

* Swipe ad creatives from competitors

* Implement Direct Response Marketing strategies to convert visitors into customers.

* Design eye-catching advertisements for social media platforms,
 marketing, and website banners.

* Create and edit product photos to enhance their appeal and showcase features effectively.

* Stay updated on industry trends and best practices in digital advertising and design.

* Accurately compare the products with the ones from our website.

* Collaborate with the marketing team and product listers

* Reviewing marketing materials, websites and presentations to ensure compliance with the regulations of the advertising platforms

Qualifications and Skills



* Proven experience in creating ad creatives.

* Experience with AI is a MUST.

* Proficiency in graphic design software such as Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) Canva etc. Software that I use myself: Elevenlabs and Clipchamp. But if you prefer to use other software, that would also be fine.

* Strong understanding of digital marketing principles and techniques.

* Excellent communication skills and ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams.

* Detail-oriented with a keen eye for visual aesthetics and design.

* Ability to multitask and prioritize tasks in a fast-paced environment.

* Familiarity with e-commerce platforms and online advertising channels.



Also:

* You do what you say. You are passionate about delivering results and you always finish what you start. - You take pride in being able to keep your word.

* Have a high attention to detail. When it comes to details, nothing gets past you.. and we mean nothing! - So much so that we want you to include "the devil is in the details" as the answer to the first question when you submit your application. Seriously.

* Preferably you have a couple of years experience in this field, and have worked for other dropshipping and e-commerce companies. You must understand how paid advertising works, in the sense that you know how sending traffic to an online store should lead to conversions.



Salary Expectations:

You will start as Trainee Ad Creative Specialist, where you will be working on the side of the company owner with compensation of 5$/hr. You will start as parttimer, but if everything goes well, this can grow into a fulltime job.



We always start with a one-month trial to ensure safety for both parties. After that, we'll have an evaluation to see if both parties would like to proceed to work together.



Benefits:

* Get to work in a young company with lots of ambitions

* Work fully remote

* Get paid every two weeks, instead of once per month (13 times per year)

* Upgrade your knowledge and skills in the fastest growing industry: digital marketing



If you can commit to and live with the following principles, then you are the type of person who will be successful and help our company thrive. If you feel this level of engagement is not right for you or that you're not willing or able to participate with us at this level, we are not a good fit for you.



Our expectation is that you will take the steps necessary to do what you say you are going to do and be accountable for your actions. In other words, live 'Above the line'.



Are you looking for a new adventure? Make sure you apply today!

title: Graphic Designer – Remote (STEAM Education Nonprofit)
description:
Job Title: Graphic Designer – Remote (STEAM Education Nonprofit)



Location: Remote

Organization: STEAM Ahead

Hours: Part-Time (10–20 hours/week)

Timezone: United States; Eastern Time



About STEAM Ahead



STEAM Ahead is a Boston-based nonprofit organization dedicated to expanding access to Science, Technology, Engineering, Arts, and Mathematics (STEAM) education for historically underrepresented youth.



We design hands-on educational programs, leadership initiatives, and workforce development experiences that help students explore STEM careers and build confidence in their abilities.

Our team collaborates with schools, universities, and corporate partners to create engaging educational experiences for young learners.



We are seeking a creative and dependable Graphic Designer to help produce visual materials that support our programs, events, and marketing initiatives.



What You’ll Work On - You will design a variety of materials used across our programs and outreach efforts, including:

- Social media graphics

- Educational worksheets and activity guides

- Presentation slides and visual decks

- Program flyers and promotional materials

- Event materials (posters, signage, handouts)

- Infographics explaining STEAM concepts

- Visual assets for our website and newsletters



Our design style is clean, modern, and educational, and many materials are created for students, educators, and corporate partners.



Tools & Skills - You should be comfortable using:

- Adobe Illustrator

- Adobe Photoshop

- Adobe InDesign

- Canva

- Google Slides or PowerPoint



Bonus skills:

- Infographic design

- Educational design

- Social media design

- Presentation design

- Basic video or motion graphics



What We’re Looking For - We’re looking for someone who is:

- Creative and detail-oriented

- Able to follow brand guidelines

- Organized and able to manage multiple projects

- Communicative and responsive

- Comfortable working independently in a remote environment

- Experience working with education organizations, nonprofits, or youth programs is a plus.



Workflow & Communication - Our team primarily uses:

- Google Drive

- Google Documents

- Slack

- Trello / Notion

- Canva



*You should be comfortable collaborating remotely and sharing editable design files when needed.



Compensation: Compensation depends on experience and availability.



How to Apply - To apply, please include:

- A link to your design portfolio

- A short message introducing yourself

- Your favorite design project you have worked on 

- The design tools you use most often and are most proficient with



Please Note:

* To help us filter applications, please include the word “CREATIVE” in the first line of your message.



* Shortlisted applicants may be asked to complete a small paid design task to help us identify candidates who are the best fit for our team.

title: Marketing Lead
description:
We are looking for a proactive and reliable Marketing Lead to oversee our marketing team and help drive consistent execution of marketing initiatives. This role requires someone with strong leadership capability, sound judgment in marketing and design decisions, and the ability to manage people effectively.



The ideal candidate has prior experience leading a marketing team, understands marketing materials and brand presentation, and can guide the team in producing high-quality content and visuals. We are also looking for someone who demonstrates professionalism, accountability, and the ability to work under pressure while maintaining team alignment.



Responsibilities



Lead and manage the marketing team to ensure tasks and campaigns are delivered on time

Provide direction on marketing strategies, campaigns, and content development

Review and guide the creation of marketing materials such as brochures, flyers, digital signage, and website content

Work closely with designers and content writers to maintain brand consistency and quality

Assess team performance, provide feedback, and ensure accountability across the team

Coordinate marketing initiatives and ensure collaboration among tea
mbers

Ensure marketing deliverables align with company goals and brand standards

Support continuous improvement of marketing processes and team productivity



Qualifications



Proven experience leading or managing a marketing team

Strong leadership, decision-making, and people management skills

Familiarity with marketing materials and strong judgment in graphic and brand presentation

Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple priorities

Strong communication and collaboration skills

Open to feedback and able to adapt quickly

Reliable, proactive, and highly accountable

Must not have other active clients to ensure full focus on the role



Work Schedule



Pacific Time: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM

TimeTracker will be used during work hours



To Apply: Send your updated resume to

title: Veterinary Customer Service Super Star
description:
Veterinary Customer Support Specialist (Remote – Philippines)

VetsInc Australia | Part-Time (20-30 Hours/Week) | Rotating Roster



About the Role



VetsInc Australia is seeking a dedicated, empathetic, and highly organized Customer Service Tea
mber to join our remote team. You will be the first point of contact for "pet parents" during critical 
nts. This role isn't just about answering phones; it’s about providing calm, professional guidance during animal emergencies and ensuring our clinical team is supported by seamless administration.



Your Responsibilities

- The Front Line: Handle inbound and outbound calls,
s, and SMS with empathy and clinical confidence.

- Coordination: Manage the schedule, book appointments, and triage client enquiries.

- Data Integrity: Maintain accurate records within our CRM (HubSpot) and Practice Management System (OpenVPMS).

- Clinical Support: Assist our vet teams with follow-up calls and essential administrative tasks.



Essential Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

-  A background in a veterinary setting (e.g., Vet Nurse, Veterinary Technician, or Veterinarian) is mandatory. You must understand clinical urgency and veterinary terminology.

- Availability: Must have availability to work Melbourne (AEDT/AEST) morning shifts.

- Communication: Exceptional, clear, and confident English (both written and verbal).

- Tech-Savvy: Proficiency in Google Suite and HubSpot is highly desirable.

- Adaptability: Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment, multitasking between high-emotion calls and detailed data entry.

- Setup: A reliable home office with a stable, high-speed internet connection.



How to Apply

We want to see your personality and hear about your experience! Please apply with a short video (maximum 3 minutes) covering the following:

- What were your daily duties in your most recent customer service or clinical role?

- Describe a recent high-emotion situation at work—how did you handle it?

- Do you have pets? Tell us about them!

- Where in the Philippines are you located? Give us a quick snapshot of your area.

- How do you maintain collaboration and productivity in a remote team environment?

- Briefly show/describe your home office setup.



Please also include your current weekly availability.

title: Senior Graphic Designer with Modern Skill with AI Prompting Master Skils and proven experience with Amazon
description:
ABOUT US



Since 2013, Prodigy Media has built more than brands — we've created an Amazon-native empire. With 12 years of proven success and 28+ product lines under our belt, we don't play small. Our mission? Launch culturally resonant, design-led, emotionally sticky products that dominate Amazon and beyond.



Now, we're leveling up — and we want a design assassin who’s mastered AI workflows, commands Midjourney like a wizard, and turns prompts into visual gold.



WHO WE WANT



This is not your average graphic design role. We're looking for a hybrid Creative Director / Prompt Engineer / Graphic Design savant who can:



Think like a marketer. Design like an artist. Prompt like an AI god.



You’ll own the visual storytelling for our brands, using both traditional tools and bleeding-edge AI systems to pump out Amazon-optimized assets that convert.



WHAT YOU’LL DO



Craft Ultra-High-Converting Amazon Ads – static, lifestyle, 
-tier, and scroll-stopping. Own A+ Content Design – full module execution with story arcs that build obsession. Design Labels & Packaging – pixel-perfect, regulatory-ready, and unforgettable on the shelf. Prompt, Edit & Produce AI-Generated Visuals – using tools like Midjourney, DALL•E, Runway, Spline, Veo3, Sora, and others. Run 3D Product Renders – via Blender, KeyShot, or AI-powered 3D tools. Develop Scroll-Hook Videos – using After Effects, Premiere, Runway AI, etc.



Systematize Brand Visuals Across 30+ Products – while keeping it all aligned, emotional, and conversion-focused.



WHO YOU ARE



5+ years in design, at least 2+ years in Amazon/e-commerce brand creative

Fluent in Adobe Creative Suite, Figma, Blender, After Effects

Pro-level Midjourney / AI prompt engineer – this is non-negotiable

Obsessed with Amazon visual psychology, packaging psychology, and design that sells

Able to juggle 10 brands and still hit deadlines

Operate with a Creative Director mindset — not just execution, but strategy

Bonus: Experience creating creative systems, art direction templates, or leading a team



MUST-HAVES

Portfolio with Amazon ads, A+ pages, labels, 3D renders, videos, and AI-gen examples

Real-world use of AI tools integrated into your workflow

Available Mon-Fri 5:00am–2:00pm PST

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
Virtual Business Development / Appointment Setter. 

Who We Are & What We Do

Atomic Projects is a Sydney-based specialist construction team—think of us as building doctors—focused on diagnosing and fixing structural and waterproofing issues before they turn into major headaches. We follow clear, step-by-step processes, use simple checklists and photos, and keep communication straightforward so there are no surprises.

Our Core Services

• Concrete Repairs: Fill cracks, replace spalled sections, and restore structural strength.

• Waterproofing: Install or renew membranes on balconies, rooftops, bathrooms, and more to keep water out.

• Brick & Façade Restoration: Carefully remove damaged bricks or mortar and rebuild to match the original look.

• Inspection Test Plans (ITPs): Provide detailed compliance documentation and quality checkpoints.

Who We Service

• Remedial Engineers: Consultants who design and specify repair solutions; we partner closely to implement their recommendations on time and to spec.

• Client-Side Project Managers: The client’s in-house or outsourced PMs who oversee coordination, quality control, budgeting, scheduling, and stakeholder reporting. We slot in as your go-to remedial specialists—providing clear scopes, regular updates, full compliance documentation, and fast issue resolution—so you can keep the bigger picture on track.

• Commercial Landlords & Asset Managers: Shopping centres, offices, and mixed-use sites requiring periodic maintenance.

• Insurance Companies & Loss Adjusters: Partners in diagnosing and fixing water damage or structural claims.

• Strata Bodies & Owners Corporations: Apartment complexes and communities

• Strata Managers & Facility Managers: Professionals overseeing maintenance budgets and schedules.



About the Role

We’re seeking a proactive, tech-savvy Virtual Business Development Manager & Appointment Setter to fuel our growth pipeline. From the comfort of your home office, you’ll identify target prospects, initiate outreach, and book qualified discovery calls with building owners, strata managers, and property developers. Your work lays the foundation for our on-the-ground BDMs to close high-value projects.



What You’ll Do

• Prospect & Research: Identify and qualify mid-market leads via LinkedIn, industry directories, and CRM data.

• Initial Outreach: Craft and send personalized
s, LinkedIn messages, and follow-up sequences.

• Appointment Setting: Schedule discovery calls and site visits for our on-site BDMs, ensuring calendar accuracy and prep materials.

• Lead Management: Log all activities in CRM (e.g., HubSpot, Salesforce), update statuses, and maintain a clean, prioritized pipeline.

• Script & Template Development: Refine messaging scripts,
 templates, and call guides to improve conversion rates.

• Reporting & Analysis: Monitor outreach performance, track key metrics (response rates, booked meetings), and provide weekly reports.

• Collaboration: Sync with estimating and operations teams to understand service offerings and tailor outreach accordingly.



What You’ll Bring

Experience & Education

• 2+ years in appointment setting, inside sales, or virtual BDM roles—construction or engineering experience a bonus.

• Comfortable working remotely and managing your own schedule.

Skills & Attributes

• Communication: Outstanding written and verbal skills; able to craft compelling messages that resonate with decision-makers.

• Tech-Savvy: Proficient with CRM platforms (HubSpot, Salesforce) and LinkedIn Sales Navigator.

• Organisation: Exceptional time management; balances multiple campaigns and follow-ups without missing a beat.

• Persistence: Tenacious follow-up and a solution-oriented mindset—turn “no replies” into conversations.

• Detail-Oriented: Ensures data accuracy in CRM and calendar bookings.

• Team Player: Thrives in a collaborative, high-performance environment—even from a distance.



What We Offer

• Flexible Remote Work: Set your own hours and work from anywhere.

• Growth Path: Learn on the job with mentorship from our senior BDMs and leadership team.

• Competitive Compensation: Base salary plus performance-based bonuses for meetings booked and conversions.

• High-Performance Culture: Join a tight-knit team that values discipline, innovation, and continuous improvement.



Why Join Us?

• Be the spearhead of our growth engine—your outreach directly drives new business.

• Shape your own processes and scripts with full autonomy.

• Work alongside seasoned professionals dedicated to excellence and long-term impact.



How to Apply



1.
 your resume and a brief cover letter outlining:

o One recent appointment-setting success story (metrics welcome).

o Your approach to turning cold leads into qualified meetings.

o English Test Results which can be completed here: 
/english-test/

o Typing Test Results which can be completed here: 
/

2. Subject line: “Virtual BDM & Appointment Setter – [Your Name]”

3. Send to:

title: Estimator / Engineer with Onsite Experience
description:
Company Overview

We’re a small group of big thinkers working together like a well-oiled machine.

We much rather work with a few exceptional individuals than a lot of average people.

A little bit our company,

We’re based in Sydney NSW

We started in 2022

We specialise in Remedial Construction which is fixing and improving existing buildings that have problems or need updates.

It includes a wide range of activities to keep buildings safe, strong, and looking good.

1. Waterproofing

2. Concrete repairs

3. Masonry repairs

4. Facade restoration

Job Summary

The Estimating Virtual Assistant plays a crucial support role within our pre-construction team, ensuring efficient and organized estimation processes.

This position is instrumental in managing administrative tasks, organizing project documentation, and supporting the Estimator and Pre-Construction Manager with detailed preparation for upcoming projects.

The role demands a high level of organization, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.

Key Responsibilities

• Meeting Coordination: Schedule and coordinate virtual meetings, including pre-construction meetings, bid discussions, and project debriefs, ensuring all necessary participants are informed and prepared.

• Deadline Management: Monitor and record project deadlines, providing timely reminders to the team to ensure that submissions and responses are prepared well in advance.

• Job Folder Organization: Set up and maintain digital job folders, ensuring that all project-related documents are accurately filed and easily accessible.

• Document Preparation and Control: Assist in compiling construction markups and preparing bills of quantities, ensuring accuracy and compliance with project requirements.

• Contractor Procurement and Management: Source new contractors, evaluate their qualifications, and maintain an up-to-date contractor list, facilitating effective bid processes and project execution.

• Administrative Support: Provide comprehensive administrative support to the estimating team, including, drafting correspondence, and any other tasks that contribute to the efficiency of the estimating process.

• Follow-Up and Feedback: Organize and manage the collection of feedback from clients and internal tea
mbers post-project completion to identify areas for improvement and celebrate successes.

• Communication: Act as a point of contact for internal and external queries related to estimation projects, ensuring clear and prompt communication.

• Data Management and Analysis: Organize and manage project data, including historical cost data, for easy access and analysis. This can help in making more accurate future estimates.

• Market Research: Conduct online research to stay updated on market trends, material costs, and the availability of subcontractors, which can influence project estimates and bids.

• Monthly Tender Reporting: Support the creation of tender reports related to projects, such as status, total amount of projects tendered, dollar value etc.



Skills and Qualifications

• Skills

o Technical Proficiency: Strong computer skills and proficiency in Plan Swift, MS Office, especially Excel, and familiarity with construction management software.

o Organizational Skills: Exceptional organizational and time-management skills, with the ability to prioritize tasks effectively.

o Attention to Detail: Meticulous attention to detail, ensuring accuracy in all aspects of work.

o Communication Skills: Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

o Proactivity and Initiative: Ability to work independently, take initiative, and proactively address potential issues before they arise.

• Qualifications: Bachelor’s degree in civil engineering, Architecture, or Quantity Surveying

• Experience:

o Experience has a quantity surveyor is preferred.

o Experience in reading and understanding drawings and technical specifications.

Work Environment

• The Estimating Virtual Assistant will operate in a dynamic, fast-paced office setting within our pre-construction department.

• Collaboration with the Estimator and Pre-Construction Manager are key components of the role.

• The position may require occasional site visits and participation in project meetings.

• This position is fully remote, providing the flexibility to work from home.

• The Estimating Virtual Assistant will be part of a supportive virtual team, with regular online meetings and communication channels to stay connected and aligned with the team's goals and projects.

Employment Type, Compensation, and Benefits

• Employment Type: Full-Time

• Compensation: TBC on Candidate

• Benefits:

o Professional Development: Opportunities for professional growth including training sessions, workshops, and seminars.

Application Process To apply for the Estimator position, please follow the steps outlined below:

1. Prepare Your Application: Compile your resume, cover letter, and any relevant certifications or portfolios that showcase your experience and skills related to construction estimation.



2. Submit Your Application:
 your application materials to 
 Please include "Estimating VA Application" in the subject line to ensure proper routing.

• Resume / CV

• Qualifications

• Academic Transcript

• Past Projects with Photos – If any

• References

• English Test Results which can be completed here: 
/english-test/

• Typing Test Results which can be completed here: 
/



3. Review Process: Our recruitment team will review applications on a rolling basis. Qualified candidates will be contacted for an initial screening interview.



4. Interviews: Selected candidates will be invited to participate in one or more interviews. This may include interviews with the Pre-Construction Manager and other key tea
mbers, potentially including practical assessments or case studies relevant to the role.



5. Decision and Offer: Final candidates will be selected based on their interviews and reference checks. An offer will be extended to the chosen candidate, including a detailed overview of the compensation package and benefits.



6. Onboarding: Upon acceptance, the new Estimator will undergo a comprehensive onboarding process to become acquainted with our team, processes, and projects.



We appreciate your interest in joining our team and look forward to reviewing your application. For any inquiries regarding the application process or the position, please
 us at

title: Veterinary Customer Service Team Member
description:
We have an opening within VetsInc Australia and are looking for a dedicated Customer Service Tea
mber to join our remote team.



About the Role:

You will be the friendly and professional first point of contact for our pet parents, primarily managing animal emergency enquiries with empathy and professionalism while supporting our clinical team with data entry and administrative tasks.

Part-time 3 days a week (approx. 24 hours per week) on a rotating roster, with potential for extra hours.



Your responsibilities will include:

- Handling inbound and outbound phone calls,
s, and text messages.

- Booking appointments and managing client enquiries.

- Assisting with maintaining the schedule.

- Working in our CRM (HubSpot) and Practice Management System (OpenVPMS) for data entry and record keeping.

- Supporting the admin and vet teams with various administrative tasks.



About You:

We are looking for a highly capable individual with a background in the veterinary field, who is a clear communicator and quick learner. You will be tech savvy and detail orientated to succeed in this role.



Essential Requirements:

- You must have a background in a veterinary setting (e.g., Nurse, Vet Nurse, Veterinarian) to effectively manage emergency enquiries and outgoing patient follow up calls.

- Clear and confident communicator (clear English required).

- Strong multitasking and time management skills.

- Detail-oriented, quick learner, and tech-savvy.

- Able to work collaboratively with our Australian-based team.

- Ideally have experience in Hubspot and Google Suite.



If this sounds like you, we’d love to please tell us more about yourself and how your skills and experience will make you a great fit for this role. Please apply with a short video answering the following questions:



What have been your daily duties in your most recent customer service role?

When was the last time you handled a high emotion situation at work and how did you handle it?

Do you have any pets of your own? If so, tell me about them!

Where do you live in the Phillipines, and tell me a bit about it.

How do you work in a team environment remotely?

Tell me about your home office set up



Please keep it to a maximum of 3 minutes and include your availability.

We’re building intentionally:

We are looking for n8n, 
, Airtable, Notion, Asana experts to help train AI. The role involves working on various mock projects while having our time tracker app running in the background that collects data on your work. You can work on these projects on your own schedule, and we pay competitive rates ranging from $5/hr to $40/hr depending on the type of work you do.

title: Video Editor for Short-Form and Long-Form Content (Ongoing)
description:
Job Title: Video Editor for Long-Form YouTube Content (Ongoing)



I'm looking for a reliable video editor for my short-form Instagram and long-form YouTube content. Videos for short form are 30-90 seconds long (3-10 minutes of raw footage) and long-form is 10-35 minutes (40-75 minutes of raw footage) that need simple editing only - no graphics, no sound effects, no fancy effects. I’m looking for simple text on screen, music overlays and simple cuts. Must have good english to understand message and know what to cut out and when.



What the job involves:



- Cut out mistakes, long pauses, and filler

- Add J/L cuts to keep transitions smooth

- Add text on screen, background music, simple graphics

- Export in original resolution



Pay: $10 per long-form video / $5 per short form video - paid per project. This is ongoing work, I publish regularly and want to find one person to work with long-term.



To get started: Shortlisted applicants will receive a paid 10-minute test long-form clip and create a short-form and long-form edit ($15). I'll hire the best edit for ongoing work.



To apply: Send me a short message about your experience with long-form and short-form content and a link to any previous work if you have it.

title: Bookkeeper
description:
Join Our Remote Accounting Team!

We are a fast-growing, boutique outsourced accounting firm supporting high-growth e-commerce and service-based businesses. While our name remains confidential for now, we’ve been behind the scenes helping some of the most exciting DTC brands scale with confidence through expert bookkeeping, financial systems, and strategic insights.



We are a remote-first company with a collaborative, client-first culture — and we’re looking for exceptional talent to grow with us.



We’re seeking a detail-oriented, tech-savvy E-commerce Bookkeeper to manage financial records, process transactions, and generate critical reports to support client decision-making. You’ll play a key role in ensuring books are accurate, clean, and up-to-date — and bring clarity to fast-moving businesses.



What You’ll Be Doing

As our Bookkeeper, you’ll support multiple clients with day-to-day accounting operations, reconciling accounts, and managing both AP and AR functions.



Your Core Responsibilities:

- Record and categorize financial transactions using QuickBooks Online

- Reconcile bank, credit card, and merchant accounts

- Prepare and analyze financial reports (P&L, Balance Sheets, Cash Flow Statements)

- Perform invoicing, collections, and accounts receivable tracking

- Process bills and manage accounts payable workflows

- Process payroll and ensure timely tax remittances

- Track and maintain accurate inventory accounting records

- Communicate with clients via dedicated channels (Slack,
, Meetings)

- Support ad hoc bookkeeping and administrative needs as required



What You’ll Bring to the Table

**Experience & Skills:

- 3+ years of experience as a Bookkeeper

- Advanced QuickBooks Online skills are required

- Strong grasp of inventory tracking and accounting best practices

- Experience reconciling financial data across multiple platforms

- Experience with NetSuite is required

- Proficient with Google Workspace, Excel, and Word

- Experience working with e-commerce or service-based businesses is a plus

**Communication & Work Environment:

- Advanced English skills (written and spoken – C1 level preferred)

- Strong attention to detail and time management

- Clear communicator who can work independently and manage deadlines

- Tech-savvy and comfortable with remote collaboration tools



What’s In It For You?

- 100% Remote Work - Work from anywhere in the Philippines. No more long commutes or stressful traffic. Spend more quality time with your loved ones and thrive in the comfort of your own home.

- Long-Term Career Growth – With opportunities to scale into higher leadership roles.

Competitive Pay – $10/hr + benefits as an independent contractor

- Supportive Culture – Work alongside a leadership team that values transparency, innovation, and your ideas.

- Positive, People-First Vibes – We believe in balance, fun, and thriving together.

- Annual Performance Reviews – Your growth gets recognized and rewarded.



Ready to Keep the Books Clean & Clients Confident?

If you’re obsessed with accuracy, enjoy structure, and love bringing order to financial chaos — this role is for you. Join our growing team of professionals who value excellence, clarity, and results.

title: Admin / Executive Assistant
description:
*** ONLY APPLY IF YOU HAVE EXPERIENCE WITH AUSTRALIAN NDIS and XERO SOFTWARE

*** DESIRABLE - has worked a corporate role in the Philippine setting



Organisation: Australian NDIS Service Provider

Location: Remote

Reports To: Chief Executive Officer (CEO)

Employment Type: Full-Time



Position Summary



The successful candidate must have prior experience working within the NDIS sector and strong hands-on experience using Xero accounting software, particularly in payroll processing, bank reconciliations, and invoicing.



The Administrative Officer / Executive Assistant to the CEO plays a critical role in supporting the operational efficiency and strategic direction of the organisation. This role provides high-level executive support to the CEO while overseeing key administrative and financial processes across the business.



This position requires exceptional organisational skills, strong financial administration capability, and the ability to operate independently in a remote environment. The role will act as a trusted support to the CEO, ensuring daily operations run smoothly while maintaining accurate financial, administrative, and compliance records.



A high level of professionalism, discretion, and the ability to manage competing priorities in a fast-paced, purpose-driven environment is essential.



Key Responsibilities

* Executive Support

- Provide high-level administrative and executive support to the CEO, including calendar management, meeting coordination, and travel arrangements.

- Prepare reports, briefing documents, presentations, and correspondence on behalf of the CEO.

- Act as a key communication point between the CEO and internal and external stakeholders.

- Manage confidential documentation and sensitive information with the highest level of discretion.

- Assist the CEO with research, strategic initiatives, and operational projects.

- Track and follow up on action items from executive and leadership meetings.



* Financial Administration (Xero)

- Manage day-to-day financial administration using Xero accounting software.

- Process employee payroll through Xero, ensuring compliance with applicable employment obligations.

- Conduct bank and credit card reconciliations and investigate discrepancies.

- Generate and manage client invoices, ensuring accuracy and timely billing.

- Monitor incoming payments and follow up on outstanding invoices.

- Maintain accurate financial records and supporting documentation.

- Assist in preparing financial reports for the CEO and leadership team.

- Liaise with external accountants and finance professionals when required.

- Support end-of-month and end-of-year financial processes.



* Administrative Operations

- Maintain organised digital filing systems and company records.

- Support internal documentation processes including contracts, position descriptions, and compliance documentation.

- Assist with HR administration including onboarding documentation, employee records, and timesheet coordination.

- Coordinate internal meetings, including agenda preparation and minute taking when required.

- Support the implementation and maintenance of internal administrative systems and workflows.

- Provide general administrative support across departments when required.



* NDIS Compliance and Operational Support

- Support administrative compliance with NDIS operational and documentation requirements.

- Assist with maintaining participant records, documentation, and service agreements where required.

- Ensure internal records and documentation meet organisational and regulatory standards.

- Assist with internal audits, documentation reviews, and compliance checks.

- Support continuous improvement of operational processes within the NDIS framework.



* Skills and Experience

Essential

- Demonstrated experience working within the NDIS sector.

- Strong hands-on experience using Xero accounting software.

- Proven experience in an Administrative Officer or Executive Assistant role supporting senior leadership.

- Demonstrated experience managing:

     - Payroll processing

     - Bank reconciliations

     - Client invoicing

     - Financial record keeping

- Additional requirements:

     - Excellent organisational and time management skills.

     - Strong written and verbal communication skills.

     - High attention to detail and accuracy.

     - Ability to manage confidential information with professionalism and discretion.

     - Strong proficiency with digital tools such as Google Workspace or Microsoft Office.

     - Ability to work independently in a remote work environment.



Desirable

- Understanding of Australian payroll and employment obligations.

- Experience working within NDIS service providers or community services organisations.

- Experience supporting executive leadership or senior management teams.

- Familiarity with operational systems such as rostering platforms, CRM systems, or workforce management software.

- Personal Attributes

- Highly organised and proactive.

- Trustworthy with strong professional integrity.

- Able to work independently and take initiative.

- Adaptable and capable of managing competing priorities.

- Solutions-focused with strong problem-solving ability.

- Exceptional attention to detail.



* What We Offer

- Philippine daytime working hours

- Remote work environment

- The opportunity to work closely with executive leadership

- A collaborative and purpose-driven organisational culture

- The ability to contribute to meaningful work within the NDIS and community services sector

title: Staff Accountant
description:
Who We Are

Accountally is a boutique bookkeeping and accounting firm built around one belief: small and mid-sized businesses deserve financial clarity without the chaos. We're a fully remote, Philippines-based team that partners closely with our clients — not just to close the books, but to give them real visibility into their numbers. We work hard, we care about doing things right, and we genuinely enjoy the people we work with (clients included).

We're growing, and we're looking for a Staff Accountant who's ready to take ownership of a portfolio of clients and grow with us.



The Role

As a Staff Accountant at Accountally, you'll manage the full accounting cycle for a portfolio of clients across a range of industries. This isn't a data-entry role — you'll be the person who owns the numbers end-to-end, ensures the books are clean and current, and delivers accurate monthly reporting that our clients actually rely on.



You'll work within a supportive team structure, with clear processes and leadership that's invested in your development. If you're someone who takes pride in accurate work, communicates proactively, and thrives in a structured remote environment, you'll feel right at home here.



What You'll Do

- Manage full-cycle bookkeeping for a portfolio of assigned clients, including transaction coding, bank and credit card reconciliations, accounts payable, and accounts receivable

- Own the month-end close process for each client — ensuring books are finalized accurately and on schedule

- Prepare and deliver monthly financial reports (P&L, Balance Sheet, Statement of Cash Flows) with a focus on accuracy and clarity

- Review and reconcile payroll entries in coordination with Gusto and other payroll platforms

- Process vendor bills and payments through 
 or other bill pay platforms

- Maintain organized, audit-ready workpapers and client files

- Identify and flag discrepancies, irregularities, or cleanup needs proactively

- Collaborate with team leads and firm leadership on process improvements and client-specific needs



What We're Looking For:

Required:

- 3+ years of full-cycle bookkeeping or accounting experience, preferably in a multi-client or firm environment

- Strong proficiency in QuickBooks Online — you can navigate it confidently and know its quirks

- Experience with Xero, 
, and Gusto (or comparable payroll platforms)

- Solid understanding of month-end close procedures and financial statement preparation

- High attention to detail and a strong sense of ownership over your work

- Clear, professional written communication skills in English

- Reliable internet connection and a dedicated, distraction-free home workspace

- Ability to work during U.S. business hours (overlap required)

Preferred:

- Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field (or equivalent experience)

- CPA or CPA board passer (not required, but a plus)

- Experience working with U.S.-based clients

- Familiarity with accrual-basis accounting



What It's Like to Work Here

- Fully remote — work from wherever you do your best work in the Philippines

- A small, close-knit team where your contributions are visible and valued

- Clear expectations, documented processes, and a leadership team that actually follows through

- Room to grow — we promote from within and invest in the people who invest in us

- A culture that values accuracy, integrity, and honest communication over performative busy-ness

title: Website Sales & Lead Generation Specialist (Cold Calling + Appointment Setting)
description:
We are a growing U.S.-based technology company that builds professional websites for small businesses. We help companies improve their online presence and generate more customers.



We are looking for a motivated and experienced Virtual Assistant who can find businesses that need websites, contact them, and set appointments for our sales team.



This is a long-term opportunity for the right person who wants stable work and performance bonuses.



Your Responsibilities



Your main goal will be to generate new business leads and schedule appointments.



Daily tasks include:



• Finding businesses that do not have websites or have outdated websites

• Scraping business contact information from Google, Yelp,
, and other directories

• Cold calling business owners

• Introducing our website services

• Booking appointments for our sales team

• Updating leads and notes in our spreadsheet or CRM



You will be helping businesses improve their online presence while helping us grow.



Required Experience



We are specifically looking for someone who has experience with:



• Cold calling and phone sales

• Appointment setting

• Lead generation and data scraping

• Finding business contact information online

• Speaking confidently with business owners



Bonus if you have experience with:



• Selling websites, digital marketing, or SEO

• Using Google Maps, Yelp, LinkedIn, or
 to find leads

• CRM systems or lead tracking tools



Requirements



• Excellent English speaking skills

• Clear phone communication

• Reliable internet connection

• Ability to work independently and stay organized, during US business hours

• Positive attitude and strong work ethic



Compensation



Base hourly pay + performance bonuses.



You will receive bonuses for:



• Qualified appointments set

• Closed deals from your appointments



Our sales team closes the deals — your job is to find the opportunities and get them on the phone.



Top performers will have opportunities for increased pay and long-term work.



Work Schedule



Part time to start.



Approximately 3–5 hours per day with the potential to increase to full time based on performance.



To Apply



Please include the following:



Your experience with cold calling or appointment setting



Any experience selling websites, marketing, or digital services



A short voice recording introducing yourself



The word "Wizard" in your application so we know you read this post.



If you are hardworking, motivated, and enjoy speaking with business owners, this can be a long-term opportunity with consistent work and bonuses.



We are excited to grow our team.
