title: Remote Operations & Accounting Manager (Retail Inventory & Bookkeeping)
description:
Company: Confidential

Location: Remote

Employment Type: Full-Time



About Us & What We're Seeking:



We're a is a fast-growing jewelry retail brand with kiosk locations in major shopping malls. We currently operate multiple locations and plan to expand to several dozen stores across the United States within the next 12 months.



As we scale, we are building strong operational systems behind the scenes. We’re looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented Full-Time Remote Operations & Accounting Manager to oversee bookkeeping, inventory systems, and back-of-house operations. This is a critical role supporting the CEO, COO, and store managers to ensure our financials, inventory, and reporting stay accurate as the business grows.



This is a full-time position, 40 hours per week. This position will require your full undivided attention during working hours.



Key Responsibilities



Accounting & Financial Management:

- Maintain and reconcile company financials in QuickBooks

- Perform weekly bank and credit card reconciliations

- Allocate expenses and revenue correctly across multiple store locations

- Track and manage inventory value and cost of goods sold

- Maintain clean books and prepare reports for leadership

- Support payroll processing through Gusto

- Assist with monthly financial reporting and P&L review by location



Inventory Management

- Maintain accurate inventory tracking across all retail locations using Square Retail

- Monitor low stock alerts and generate weekly restock reports using Square Retail

- Create location-specific inventory reports for store managers

- Prepare pick & pack inventory sheets for headquarters shipments

- Track inventory transfers between locations

- Ensure inventory costs are properly recorded in QuickBooks



Operations Support

- Coordinate communication between HQ and store managers

- Assist with supplier relations and purchase orders

- Place inventory orders with vendors when stock levels require

- Maintain operational spreadsheets and dashboards

- Help develop and improve internal systems as the company scales



Team Coordination

- Communicate with store managers regarding inventory needs

- Support the CEO, COO, and leadership team with operational tasks

- Help maintain organized documentation and SOPs

- Identify operational inefficiencies and suggest improvements



Our Ideal Candidate:



- You are extremely organized, proactive, and comfortable managing both numbers and operational systems.

- You thrive in fast-growing companies where processes are still being built.



Required Experience:



- Strong experience with QuickBooks

- Experience with bank reconciliation and bookkeeping

- Experience managing inventory in retail or ecommerce

- Experience with Square Retail or comparable POS software

- Strong Google Sheets / Excel skills

- Excellent written and verbal communication

- Highly organized and detail oriented



Preferred Experience



- Experience supporting multi-location retail businesses

- Familiarity with Gusto payroll

- Experience with inventory systems or POS integrations

- Experience working with U.S.-based companies

- Experience supporting fast-growing startups



Compensation:

Competitive compensation based on experience. Long-term opportunity with a rapidly growing retail brand.



To Apply - Please include:

- A brief introduction about your experience

- Your experience with QuickBooks and inventory management

- What are you looking for and what is your current work situation?

- Your availability and hourly rate

title: Content Manager/Content Curator – Video Podcast Remote
description:
Company Overview:

We are 37 Projects, a fast-growing YouTube Video Marketing Agency that helps health and wellness brands maximize their reach through high-quality video content, Shorts, and podcast marketing. We’re looking for a YouTube & Podcast Content Manager who can analyze long-form podcasts, craft compelling YouTube Shorts & Clips, and ensure all content aligns with the client’s brand voice and audience engagement strategies.



I. Content Manager Responsibilities



1. Content Consumption



- Watch 1–2 hour video podcasts on health, fitness, and nutrition topics.

- Develop a deep understanding of each podcast’s themes and key messages to inform content creation.



2. Clip & Short Identification (NOT Editing)



- Identify segments ideal for YouTube Clips and YouTube Shorts.

- Select the best 
nts for intros that build a compelling storytelling narrative.



3. Content Strategy & Quality Assurance



- Ensure all clips, shorts, and intros align with the client’s brand voice and content strategy.

- Perform content-only quality checks on first rough-cut videos (focus on flow, clarity, and messaging—not captions, graphics, or motion design).



4. Intros & Trailers



- Select punchy and engaging 
nts from the podcast to be used in the trailer (approx. 70–80 seconds).

- Provide editors with timestamps and key sentences to include, ensuring the trailer highlights the right topics or subtopics.

- Collaborate with the Project Manager and Video Editor to align on creative direction and client expectations.



Example: Similar to Steven Bartlett’s Diary of a CEO trailers, which combine intro narration with short, high-impact clips.



II. Scope of Work



- Manage content across five clients.

- Watch and process around 15–16 podcasts per month (on average, 3–4 per client).

- Produce selections for around 8 trailers per month (?2 per week, one per client).

- Deliverables include weekly clips, shorts, and trailers, ensuring consistency across all client channels.

- Collaborate closely with Project Managers and Video Editors to maintain smooth production flow and client satisfaction.



III Requirements:



1. Availability & Commitment:

- Full-time remote position - no other job commitments to ensure focus.

- Must have a high-performance laptop/computer and stable internet.



2. Experience & Education:

- Proven experience in video editing or podcast production (video/audio).

- Graduates in Communication, Multimedia, or Video Production are highly preferred.

- Experience in YouTube content creation (Shorts, Clips, long-form podcasts) - a bonus



3. Skills & Tools:

- SEO writing experience is a plus.

- Strong organizational and time management skills to handle multiple projects.

- Proficiency in:

   + Slack

   + Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive)

   + Notion

   + AI writing tools (ChatGPT, Claude)

   + YouTube SEO tools (VidIQ, SEMrush) – a bonus



4. Strong storytelling ability to identify and structure the most compelling 
nts in videos.



5. Preferred Bonus Skills:

- Knowledge of health, fitness, and nutrition topics (to select key 
nts effectively).

- Creative mindset with the ability to suggest innovative content formats & strategies.

title: VA - Shopify, Faire, CX and Daily Operations for E-Comm Home Decor Business
description:
Business: Inner Child (e-comm home decor & accessories), 

Type: Remote 

Timezone: Prefer overlap with US Eastern (NYC time)

Start: ASAP



About Inner Child



Inner Child is a design-led home decor and accessories brand built around delightful, high-quality artisanal products—think elevated, playful, and beautiful. We sell primarily DTC on Shopify and wholesale via Faire, and we run a fast-moving operation where details matter.



We’re looking for a sharp, reliable VA to own the daily operating rhythm across Shopify, Faire, customer experience, and general e-comm operations. This role is for someone who likes clean systems, takes initiative, and can keep an online store running smoothly without being chased.



What You’ll Own (Responsibilities)

1) Shopify Operations (Daily / Weekly)



Maintain product listings: titles, descriptions, variants, pricing, tags, collections, SEO fields



Upload and organize product images; ensure images are correctly cropped/centered and consistent



Publish new products and update existing ones as inventory, packaging, or specs change



Create and QA discount codes and promotions (rules, stacking behavior, expiration)



Basic site QA: broken links, navigation issues, add-to-cart/checkout checks, out-of-stock logic



Coordinate simple theme setting updates (no heavy coding required)



2) Faire Wholesale Operations



Process wholesale orders and communicate timelines/updates to buyers



Maintain Faire catalog: listings, pricing, case packs, lead times, inventory sync logic



Handle buyer messaging (fast, friendly, professional) and resolve issues



Support sampling, new account onboarding, and re-order workflows



Prepare weekly snapshots: orders, inquiries, best-sellers, and anything that needs attention



3) Customer Experience (CX) –
 First



Respond to customer
s and DMs with a warm, premium-brand voice



Handle common requests: shipping updates, order edits, returns/exchanges, product questions



Track and escalate exceptions: lost/damaged packages, wrong items, address issues



Maintain CX macros/templates and improve them over time (faster + more consistent)



4) Daily Operations & Admin



Coordinate with 3PL/warehouse: shipment issues, inventory checks, address corrections



Create/maintain simple trackers: backorders, replacements, damaged goods, open issues



Support basic reporting: daily order count, top SKUs, low stock, returns reasons, etc.



Keep operations organized: clean documentation, checklists, and “nothing falls through cracks” follow-through



What “Great” Looks Like



You are proactive and detail-obsessed (in a good way): you spot issues before customers do



You communicate clearly and don’t let tasks linger



You’re comfortable working in a fast-moving environment with lots of small moving parts



You like building systems: templates, checklists, trackers, and repeatable workflows



You can switch between creative brand polish and operational precision



Requirements



Hands-on experience with Shopify (product setup, collections, discounts, order basics)



Experience with Faire (preferred) or wholesale marketplace workflows



Strong written English and customer-facing professionalism



Extremely organized; comfortable managing multiple workstreams and deadlines



Comfortable with Google Sheets / Excel and lightweight reporting



Bonus: Klaviyo basics, Google Merchant Center familiarity, or Shopify apps (reviews, bundles, inventory tools)



Tools We Use (or similar)



Shopify, Faire, Gmail, Google Sheets/Docs, Canva, Excel (optional: Klaviyo, Slack, project tracker like Notion/Trello/Asana)



How to Apply



Please include:



A short intro and why this role fits you



Your Shopify + Faire experience (specific examples)



Your availability (hours/week) and timezone



Your hourly rate (or monthly retainer)



A brief example of how you’d reply to this customer message:

“Hi! I ordered 6 days ago and haven’t seen tracking update. Can you help?”



Optional but appreciated: a screenshot/list of stores you’ve supported or a short Loom walkthrough of similar work



Inner Child is an equal opportunity business. We care most about excellent execution, reliability, and good judgment.

title: We need someone who has actually managed brands on Amazon — not just run tasks for one. Full-Time
description:
We are looking for an experienced Amazon Brand Manager to take full ownership of the day-to-day operations and growth strategy for two brands on Amazon. This is a hands-on role where you will manage everything from listing optimization and advertising to inventory coordination and brand protection. The right person is someone who has managed brand-side Amazon accounts (not just agency or VA-level tasks), understands the platform deeply, and can operate independently with minimal oversight.

You will also support DTC and Shopify efforts as they relate to the broader brand strategy, so familiarity with those channels is a plus.



Key Responsibilities

Listing & Catalog Management



Own and optimize all product listings including titles, bullet points, descriptions, A+ Content, and backend search terms

Manage catalog updates, variation strategy, and new product launches on Amazon

Monitor and resolve listing suppression, policy violations, and catalog errors



Advertising & Promotions



Build, manage, and optimize PPC campaigns (Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, Sponsored Display) to hit target ACoS and TACOS goals

Plan and execute promotional strategies including coupons, Lightning Deals, and seasonal campaigns

Track advertising performance and provide regular reporting with actionable insights



Brand Protection & Account Health



Monitor for unauthorized sellers, hijackers, and counterfeit issues and take action to resolve them

Manage Brand Registry tools, Transparency program enrollment, and IP enforcement

Maintain account health metrics and proactively address any flags or policy warnings



Inventory & Operations



Coordinate with supply chain and prep center teams to ensure inventory levels are maintained and shipments are created on time

Monitor FBA inventory health, stranded inventory, and restock recommendations

Manage FBM fulfillment workflows as needed for DTC and Shopify orders



Reporting & Strategy



Provide weekly and monthly performance reports covering sales, advertising, organic rankings, and key KPIs

Analyze market trends, competitor activity, and customer reviews to identify growth opportunities

Develop and execute a brand growth roadmap aligned with company goals

To confirm you have read this entire post, please begin your application with the word "Blueprint"





Requirements



3+ years of hands-on experience managing Amazon brand accounts (Seller Central required, Vendor Central a plus)

Strong understanding of Amazon SEO, A9/COSMO algorithm, and listing optimization best practices

Proven track record managing and scaling Amazon PPC campaigns profitably

Experience with Brand Registry, Transparency, Project Zero, or similar brand protection tools

Familiarity with inventory management, FBA shipment workflows, and supply chain coordination

Comfortable working with data and pulling insights from Seller Central reports, Brand Analytics, and third-party tools (Helium 10, Jungle Scout, Keepa, etc.)

Strong written and verbal communication skills with the ability to provide clear, concise updates

Self-starter who can work independently, prioritize effectively, and take ownership without needing to be micromanaged





Nice to Have



Experience managing a Shopify store or DTC channel alongside Amazon

Familiarity with MFN (Merchant Fulfilled Network) fulfillment for multi-channel orders

Experience in the health, wellness, or supplements category on Amazon

Knowledge of Amazon DSP or external traffic strategies (Google Ads, social media to Amazon)





What We Offer



Full-time remote position with flexible hours (some overlap with US Eastern time required)

Opportunity to manage two growing brands with real autonomy and decision-making authority

A small, fast-moving team where your work directly impacts the bottom line

Room to grow into a leadership role as the brands scale

Competitive salary based on experience





How to Apply

Please submit your application with the following:



Which of the responsibilities listed above is your strongest area? Give a specific example from a brand you have managed.

Your resume or a brief summary of your relevant Amazon experience

Examples of brands or accounts you have managed on Amazon (screenshots, case studies, or metrics are a plus)

A short note on what tools you use regularly and how you approach managing a brand on Amazon day to day

Your expected monthly salary or rate



We review every application carefully. If your experience is a fit, we will reach out to schedule an introductory call.

title: Instagram Growth Strategist & Content Lead
description:
About 37 Projects

We are a leading video podcast marketing agency specializing in health and wellness content. We manage YouTube growth for top experts, nutritionists, and medical professionals, helping their content reach the right audience. Now, we’re looking for a Podcast Video Editor to join our team!



The Mission

We are launching and scaling a fitness & wellness Instagram account from the ground up.



This role is not about posting randomly.

It is about:

- Building a growth engine

- Reverse-engineering competitors

- Designing a 30/60/90-day roadmap

- Executing content daily

- Managing community engagement

- Tracking performance and iterating



You own the strategy and the execution.



Core Responsibilities

1. Competitive Intelligence & Market Research

You will:

- Research competitors in fitness & wellness

- Study accounts we provide (to model/mimic strategically)

- Break down:

  + Hooks

  + Post formats

  + Viral patterns

  + Messaging angles

  + Frequency

  + Engagement structure

- Translate findings into actionable strategy



We are not copying blindly.

We are extracting patterns and improving them.



2. 30 / 60 / 90 Day Content Roadmap

You will build:

- A detailed 30-day content calendar

- A 60-day optimization projection

- A 90-day growth direction



Posting cadence:

- 2 static posts per day

- 4–5 short-form videos per week

- Daily Instagram Stories



Everything must align with one strategic positioning.



3. Content Creation & Scriptwriting

You will:

- Design static and carousel posts

- Write scripts for 30–60 sec short-form videos

- Create strong first-3-second hooks

- Develop angles based on trends + competitor research

- Adapt trends intelligently to fitness/wellness audience



Videos will be produced via UGC AI tools or UGC creators.

You are responsible for concept, script and execution via UGC platforms.



4. Community Management & Engagement (Critical)

You will actively manage the account:

- Reply to comments daily

- Engage in meaningful conversations

- Pin strategic comments

- Spark discussions

- Respond to DMs professionally

- Monitor audience sentiment



You understand that: Engagement drives distribution.



This is not passive.

You help build the community, not just content.



5. Execution & Visual Direction

- Maintain brand consistency

- Ensure clean and recognizable aesthetic

- Use tools like Canva, Figma, or similar

- Align visuals with performance goals

- Optimize captions for saves and shares



6. Analytics & Performance Optimization

Weekly & monthly reporting must include:

- Reach

- Engagement rate

- Saves

- Shares

- Watch time / retention (for videos)

- Follower growth

- Content format performance



You must clearly identify:

- What to stop

- What to scale

- What to test next

- What to double down on



We operate based on data, not assumptions.



Ideal Candidate Profile



You:

- Think like a strategist

- Act like an operator

- Understand Instagram psychology

- Can reverse-engineer competitors

- Write compelling short-form scripts

- Are deeply interested in fitness & wellness trends

- Know how to build engagement early-stage accounts



Bonus if you:

- Use AI tools effectively (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.)

- Understand UGC content systems

- Have grown accounts from scratch

- Can interpret retention data



Success Metrics

- Consistent daily execution

- Follower growth trajectory

- Increasing saves & shares

- Strong engagement rate

- Clear content evolution month over month

- Active, engaged comment section



This Is Not For You If

- You only schedule posts

- You avoid data

- You don’t enjoy engagement

- You need constant micro-direction

- You don’t understand hooks and audience psychology

title: Marketing & Outreach Virtual Assistant
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



I run a luxury residential interior design firm based in Beverly Hills. My work has been featured in Architectural Digest, Elle Decor, and the Wall Street Journal. I need a sharp, self-directed VA to run my marketing and outreach engine so I can stay focused on clients and creative direction.



This is not a creative role. I have AI tools and systems that generate all written content. Your job is to execute — consistently, accurately, and without needing to be chased.



If you need a lot of direction, this is not the right role. If you are systematic, proactive, and fluent in AI tools, keep reading.



---



WHAT YOU WILL DO



Broker outreach

- Research luxury real estate agents who recently closed high-end properties in Los Angeles, Miami, and New York

- Prepare personalized outreach
s using pre-written templates and log all contacts in our tracker

- Manage the 3-touch follow-up sequence and keep records updated



Social media

- Schedule Instagram, TikTok, and Pinterest content using Later

- Format captions and graphics in Canva using provided templates

- Reply to comments daily using approved response frameworks

- Flag anything that needs the principal's direct attention



Press and speaking outreach

- Monitor HARO (Help a Reporter Out) three times daily

- Flag relevant journalist queries immediately

- Prepare pitches using AI-written copy for approval

- Research upcoming design and luxury real estate events for speaking opportunities



Website and content

- Upload approved articles and SEO pages to our website (Figma Make)

- Format and publish content according to provided guidelines



Weekly reporting

- Send a one-paragraph summary every Friday: what went out, what got responses, what needs attention



---



WHAT I AM LOOKING FOR



- You use Claude or ChatGPT, Canva, and a social scheduling tool (Later, Buffer, or similar) in your current work — not as a novelty, as a daily habit

- You have experience supporting a creative professional, personal brand, or luxury service business

- You communicate proactively. If something is delayed or unclear, you say so before I notice.

- You work independently. You do not need daily check-ins to stay on track.

- Your written English is excellent — you will be preparing
s on behalf of my brand

- You are organized and keep clean logs and trackers without being reminded

- You are available for 2–3 hours of overlap with Pacific Time (Los Angeles) daily



---



TOOLS YOU WILL USE



Claude AI · Canva · Later · Notion · Google Sheets · Figma Make



---



HOW TO APPLY



Do not send a generic application. In your message, answer these three questions:



1. What AI tools do you use daily and for what tasks?

2. Describe a time you ran an outreach or content process without being micromanaged. What did it look like?

3. What is one thing you notice about the Joelle Uzyel brand (
) that you would want to understand better before starting?



Applications that do not answer all three questions will not be reviewed.

title: Read Full Ad. Virtual Assistant. Coachable + Tech Savvy, Grow with us! :)
description:

title: Senior Accountant – NetSuite & E-commerce Operations
description:
MUST HAVE STRONG NETSUITE EXPERIENCE



Bank & Payment Reconciliation



Daily bank data import & matching using Bank Feeds.

Automated bank reconciliation rules setup (mapping payees, transaction types, variances).

Investigating unmatched bank transactions & creating missing GL entries.





Credit Card Expense Reconciliation



Importing corporate card transactions into NetSuite (Amex, Chase, etc.).

Mapping transactions to expense categories and departments/classes.

Matching credit card transactions to vendor bills.

Monthly reconciliation of credit card statements to GL balances.





E-commerce Reconciliation



Shopify

Matching up payments with their orders.

Adjusting for variances – reviewing order totals against discounts, taxes, shipping, fees, etc.

Walmart

Matching up payments with their orders

Adjusting for chargebacks, returns, and fee deductions

eBay

Matching up payments with their orders

Adjusting for fees, commission, etc.

Home Depot EDI reconciliation

Match up payments with invoices





Amazon Vendor Central Reconciliation



Mapping Amazon invoices & orders to NetSuite sales orders.

Reconciliation of Amazon remittances (Vendor Central remittance statements).

Adjustments for chargebacks, fees, shortages, and allowances.





General Ledger & Financial Close



Monthly and annual accounting period close in NetSuite.

Reviewing & posting adjusting journal entries.

Reconciling balance sheet accounts:

Accounts Receivable

Accounts Payable

Inventory & COGS

Deferred revenue

Fixed assets & depreciation

Reviewing Chart of Accounts and providing suggestions as needed





Inventory & COGS Reconciliation



Matching inventory receipts, vendor bills, and landed cost calculations.

Resolving variances between purchase orders, item receipts, and bills.

Ensuring correct costing method (FIFO/average/standard).





Reporting & Automation Setup



Building saved searches for reconciliation workflows.

Creating dashboards for stakeholders.

KPI reporting on AR aging, cash flow, chargebacks, and profitability by channel.

title: Creative Video Producer (YouTube & Short-Form Content)
description:
About 37 Projects

We are the #1 Video Podcast Marketing Service for Health & Performance Brands.

We help top experts, nutritionists, doctors, and wellness professionals grow their YouTube presence with engaging, high-quality content.



About the Role

We are looking for a Creative Video Producer to help improve the storytelling and visual impact of our videos.



This is not a video editing role and not a quality control role.



Your job is to review videos and give creative direction to our editors on what visuals, text, and animations should be added to make the content more engaging and easier to understand.



Our company produces YouTube videos, podcast clips, explainers, and Shorts for health experts, doctors, and wellness brands.



Many of our videos include scientific or educational content, so we need someone who can think creatively about how to visualize ideas.



For example:

If a speaker talks about protein intake after age 40, you might suggest:

• Adding an animated comparison chart

• Highlighting key phrases with text overlays

• Using icons or simple graphics to visualize the concept

• Showing numbers in an animated format

• Emphasizing important statements with motion graphics



You will leave clear comments and instructions for the editor on what to add and where.



You will work with tools such as:

• 

• Slack

• Notion



You do not need to edit the video yourself, but you must understand how video editors work so you can give useful instructions.



Responsibilities

• Review YouTube videos, explainers, and Shorts

• Suggest motion graphics, text overlays, and visual elements

• Write clear comments for editors explaining what should appear on screen

• Suggest graphs, diagrams, icons, and animations when helpful

• Create simple visual sketches when needed

• Identify 
nts where visuals could improve storytelling

• Ensure videos remain engaging, clear, and visually dynamic



Important: This Is NOT

? Not a video editing job

? Not a quality control job

? Not checking captions or spelling



This role focuses on creative thinking and visual storytelling.



Requirements

• Strong understanding of YouTube and short-form video content

• Ability to visualize ideas and explain them clearly to editors

• Good sense of visual storytelling

• Basic understanding of motion graphics and animations

• Excellent written English for giving clear instructions

• Organized and detail-oriented



Bonus if you have experience with:

• YouTube content

• Educational videos

• Motion graphics

• Science / health content



Who This Role Is Perfect For

This role is ideal for someone who:

• Enjoys thinking about how to visualize ideas in video

• Watches YouTube and notices how graphics and animations are used

• Likes improving content creatively

• Understands what makes videos engaging



Work Setup

Remote position



You will collaborate with our team of:

• Video editors

• Content managers

• Designers



How To Apply:

Fill up this form:

What You'll Be Doing

After training, you will manage between 3 and 8 live chats at the same time. Your focus will be on building rapport, guiding customers toward purchases, and upselling products and services in a way that feels genuine and conversational rather than scripted or pushy. Hitting daily and weekly sales targets is a key part of the job, and you will be expected to follow team guidelines consistently.



What We Are Looking For



Written English that sounds natural, fluid, and engaging (tested during the hiring process)

Fast and accurate typing skills (also tested)

A genuine sales instinct and confidence when it comes to closing

The ability to read tone, mood, and intent through text alone

Reliable high-speed internet, a capable laptop, and a quiet workspace

Availability for both day and night shifts

A professional, discreet, and mature approach to the work





What's In It For You

You will receive weekly payouts through Wise or Payoneer, full paid training, and ongoing coaching and support. Your base pay grows as your performance improves, and top earners make significantly more than the starting rate. We are looking for people who want a stable, long-term position with real room to grow.



How to Apply

Send us a short message that includes:



Why you would be great at sales-based chat work

Your background and relevant experience

A brief personal description and your CV if you have one



Please note: This role requires strong, natural English and genuine conversational ability. If you are not fully confident in both, we ask that you do not apply. We review every application carefully and will move on quickly from anyone who does not meet the listed requirements.

title: Operations & Systems Virtual Assistant for Growing Real Estate Business
description:
Help Build the Engine Behind a Growing U.S. Real Estate Business



Remote | Long-Term Role | Operations & Systems



We are looking for a highly organized, detail-driven Virtual Assistant who loves systems, structure, and helping a business scale.



This is not a basic task VA role.



We are looking for someone who enjoys building organized systems, managing operations, improving workflows, and helping a business run efficiently behind the scenes



If you enjoy turning chaos into clarity and helping businesses operate smoothly, this role will be a great fit.



Responsibilities



You will support daily business operations by managing
 and calendars, organizing files and spreadsheets, maintaining and updating the CRM (including tagging leads, updating notes, and managing follow-up tasks), assisting with client care communication, helping manage and organize leads in the pipeline, maintaining workflows in project management systems like Trello, documenting and updating SOPs, supporting the team with organized systems and processes, and using AI and productivity tools to improve efficiency and keep operations running smoothly.



Ideal Candidate



? Extremely organized

? Strong attention to detail

? Comfortable with technology

? Strong communication skills

? Proactive and reliable

? Enjoys improving systems and processes, building, organizing SOP's



How to Apply



To apply, please include:



Your resume or work experience



A short message explaining why you would be a good fit



Your experience with systems, CRM, or administration duties



Your favorite productivity or AI tool



Include the  word ORGANIZED at the end of your subject line



Applications without this will not be reviewed

title: Amazon FBA / FBM Product Sourcer – Must Have Experience (Auto-Ungated Leads Required)
description:
We are looking for an experienced Amazon FBA / FBM product sourcer to join our team. You must have prior experience sourcing profitable products and understanding Amazon seller rules. This position is for someone who can independently find high-quality leads that are safe for a new Amazon account.



Requirements:



Must have proven experience with Amazon FBA / FBM sourcing



Must know how to find auto-ungated products for new seller accounts



Must understand Keepa, SellerAmp, RevSeller, or similar tools



Must be able to find profitable leads with good ROI and low competition



Must know how to check IP complaints, hazmat, meltable, and restriction risks



Must know how to source from online retail, wholesale, or distributors



Must provide at least 5–10 leads per day







Lead Requirements:



Auto-ungated for new account



ROI minimum 30%



Minimum $5 profit per unit



BSR under 200,000 preferred



No IP complaints / No brand restrictions



No Amazon dominant listings







Responsibilities:



Daily product sourcing



Sending leads in Google Sheets format



Following sourcing criteria strictly



Working long term if performance is good



How to Apply:



Send your application with:



Your experience with Amazon FBA / FBM



Tools you use



Sample leads (Send 5 auto-ungated leads for new account)



Your expected pay







Only experienced applicants will be accepted.

title: Senior Lead Generation & Growth Manager -night shift
description:
We are looking for a high-performing lead generation professional who knows how to build lists, manage CRM systems, communicate to the target audience and drive real outbound growth.



This is not a junior role. We need someone who has 3 to 5 years of experience building targeted lists, running outreach campaigns, improving response and conversions, and managing CRM segmentation.



You will own our outbound engine.



You must:

• Have excellent English communication skills

• Have strong CRM experience

• Be highly organized and detail-oriented

• Be comfortable working until 3 to 4 AM Philippines time

• Be confident managing campaigns independently



You will be responsible for:

• List development and management

• CRM hygiene and segmentation

• LinkedIn outreach

•
 campaign management

•
 copy and improvement

• Supporting workshop promotion campaigns

• Weekly performance reporting



If you are someone who improves systems instead of just maintaining them, we want to speak with you.



Please apply with:

1. A short video introduction

2. A description of the CRM systems you’ve used

3. Metrics from a campaign you’ve managed

4. Your availability for night shift work

5.     USD hourly rate - this position is hourly plus commission on closed business.

title: Graphic Designer & AI Video Creator + Editor
description:
AI Graphic Designer & Video Creator (Part
-Time, 20h/week+)

We are a fast-growing European food brand looking for a talented AI-native graphic designer who can produce scroll-stopping ad creatives, AI-generated videos, and social media content at high velocity - while following our brand SOPs and creative direction.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Design high-converting static and animated visuals for Meta Ads & TikTok Ads (multiple formats, hooks, angles)

Generate organic AI videos following our internal SOPs using tools like Runway, Kling, Pika, HeyGen, or similar

Edit and assemble final videos (cuts, transitions, text overlays, sound/music sync) using CapCut, Premiere, or DaVinci

Create Instagram/TikTok posts, stories, reels covers, and carousels

Integrate real product photos into AI-generated scenes with professional retouching

Follow brand guidelines, color palette, typography, and tone across all deliverables

Produce multiple variations quickly, iterate based on feedback, maintain fast turnaround



REQUIREMENTS



Proven experience with AI image generation tools (Midjourney, DALL-E, Flux, Leonardo, or similar)

Proven experience with AI video generation tools (Runway, Kling, Pika, HeyGen, or similar)

Solid video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, or DaVinci) — cuts, transitions, text overlays, sound sync

Strong skills in Canva Pro, Photoshop, or Figma for post-production and layout

Understanding of direct-response ad creative (hooks, pain points, CTAs)

Strong visual creativity with a sense of what goes viral — especially in food/lifestyle content on TikTok and Instagram

Fluent in English

Reliable internet, available for async communication.



COMPENSATION

$5/hour starting rate — negotiable based on your portfolio quality, skills, and experience. We're looking for a top-tier profile and we're willing to pay for it. Opportunity to grow into a full-time role as the brand scales.



HOW TO APPLY

?? Start your application with the word "VIOLET" — applications without it will not be reviewed.



Your portfolio (link or PDF) showing AI-generated visuals, AI-generated videos, AND video editing work

A short Loom video (2–3 min) walking through your best AI-generated work

A short answer: What AI tools do you use daily, and what's your favorite one and why?



Shortlisted candidates will receive a practical test.

title: Short Form Content Editor
description: Magnify Vision Media is looking for a remote short-form video editor to create engaging content for TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and paid social ads. Editors should be skilled in fast-paced social media editing, adding captions, motion graphics, jump cuts, and hooks that keep viewers watching and convert for ads. Experience with Premiere Pro, Final Cut, CapCut, or similar is preferred. This is freelance / per-project work with potential for ongoing projects. Please apply with 3–5 examples of short-form edits and your rate per video.

title: Figma UI/UX Designer — E-commerce, Shopify, CRO
description:
We need a UI/UX designer for e-commerce (landing pages, PDPs, flows). Figma required; Shopify/theme context a plus. 



We're a Shopify agency looking for a UI/UX Designer (e-commerce, Figma) to design landing pages, product pages, and conversion flows for DTC brands. Our clients are 7- and 8-figure US-based brands.



Our team offers training and resources for you to deliver quality results. 



Requirements:



Strong Figma skills; e-commerce or DTC experience

Understanding of conversion and e-commerce UX

Ability to explain design decisions (we use Loom in screening — show, don't tell)



Share portfolio and a short Loom on a recent e-commerce design. One specific role.

title: Meta Ads Execution Specialist (Part-Time)
description:
About Us

We’re a programming education company that helps experienced software engineers build real-world Rust projects and land Rust roles. We run a high-ticket, cohort-based accelerator plus self-paced training, and reach engineers through YouTube,
, and partnerships.



Role Overview

We are looking for a part-time Meta Ads Operator to implement and maintain our
 and Instagram campaigns. This is an execution-focused role: you will take clear targeting and creative direction from the founder and marketing team, then handle setup, tracking, and ongoing optimizations inside Meta Ads Manager.



Ideal for someone who enjoys clean accounts, accurate tracking, and making data-driven tweaks, not sitting in branding meetings.



Key Responsibilities

1. Implement and maintain Meta Pixel and Conversion API across our funnels (waitlist, applications, bookings, purchases).

2. Set up campaigns, ad sets, and ads according to provided specs (objectives, budgets, audiences, and creatives).

3. Create and manage custom and lookalike audiences from our traffic,
 list, and engaged users.

4. Monitor performance daily on weekdays and execute simple rules: pause obvious losers, keep winners within defined guardrails, and flag issues quickly.

5. Run basic A/B tests on creatives and audiences following our testing framework.

6. Ensure tracking events fire correctly on all key steps and troubleshoot when they do not.

7. Produce a concise weekly report (spend, cost per waitlist opt-in, cost per application, cost per call, cost per student) with 2 to 3 clear recommendations.



You Are A Good Fit If

1. You have 1 to 3 years of hands-on experience running Meta Ads (lead gen or info/education experience is a plus).

2. You are comfortable with Meta Ads Manager, Pixel, standard events, and basic CAPI.

3. You can read numbers and make simple performance-based decisions without drama.

4. You are organized, responsive, and document what you do so others can follow it.

5. You can overlap at least 2 to 3 hours per day with US time zones.

6. You’re currently freelancing or working part time and want a long term core client, not just a one-off project.



This Role Is Not

1. Not a creative director or copywriter (we have a content and
 team).

2. Not a CMO or growth strategist d
 offers, funnels, or pricing.

3. Not a general social media manager (no organic posting, community management, or influencer work).



Scope & Engagement

1. Part-time contractor.

2. We’ll start at 5–10 hours/week for the first 60–90 days while we validate and scale Meta.

3. We guarantee a minimum of 20 hours/month, paid monthly, so your time is predictable.

4. If performance is strong and we scale ad spend, this role can grow into 15–20+ hours/week and potentially a full-time PH position.

5. Remote, flexible schedule as long as SLAs are met and campaigns are monitored on weekdays.



How To Apply



Please reply to this job post with the following:

1. A brief summary of your Meta Ads experience, including typical monthly budgets.

2. Screenshots or summaries of 2 to 3 campaigns you have managed (goal, budget, structure, and results).

3. One paragraph on how you normally set up tracking (pixel, events, CAPI) for a lead gen funnel.

4. Your part-time hourly rate and full-time monthly rate, respectively.

title: Looking for a Operations Manager
description:
Requirements:

• Experience organizing projects, tasks, and internal operations for an online business

• Must know how to maneuver basic webhooks and understand basic backend API concepts

• Must know how to use spreadsheets (Google Sheets or Excel)

• Must know how to use Trello for task tracking and workflow management

• Must know how to use 
 for communication and team coordination

• Strong attention to detail and ability to keep systems organized

• Comfortable documenting processes and keeping records updated

• Can start ASAP

• Applicants without relevant experience will be ignored.



IMPORTANT:

We are looking for someone who can help organize internal operations, keep systems clean, and make sure information flows smoothly between tools and tea
mbers.



Role Overview:

• Organize and maintain spreadsheets, task boards, and internal tracking systems

• Help manage Trello boards and ensure tasks are properly organized and updated

• Assist with setting up and maintaining simple webhooks and backend API connections used by the business

• Keep internal systems structured so the team can easily track progress and information

• Coordinate through 
 to keep communication organized

• Document processes and help maintain operational clarity across the team



To Apply:

Send a short message describing your experience with webhooks, APIs, spreadsheets, Trello, and 
. Please also include your 
 username so we can contact you.



Also, we've had issues with bot applications lately. To help us filter, please start your message with a fruit that's yellow when ripe, and if you enjoy baking, feel free to share a quick recipe for something preferably something Georgian or your personal favorite!

title: Phone-First Customer Experience VA (US Company | Pacific Time)
description:
We’re hiring a confident, phone-savvy professional to become the first voice customers hear at Graham Landscape & Design.



This is not a back-office admin job.



This role is for someone who thrives in live conversations, builds instant trust, and can guide customers with clarity and warmth while managing systems at the same time. 



If you take pride in excellent communication and love helping customers feel taken care of, you will do very well here.



Your performance directly impacts customer experience, booked appointments, and company growth.



Primary Responsibility: Phone Excellence

Your #1 priority is handling incoming customer calls exceptionally well — every time. You will:

- Answer all inbound calls within 30 seconds using approved greeting scripts

- Handle calls via Dialpad with professionalism, clarity, and urgency

- Confidently guide callers through conversations

- Gather critical customer information accurately (Full name, Service address, Phone number, Service need)

- Determine whether the caller is a new customer, a previous or an existing customer, or a new owner of a serviced property

- Verify and update customer records in the CRM

- Book the first sales or service appointment during the call whenever possible

- Clearly explain next steps, expectations, and service policies (including drive-time billing when applicable)

- Handle missed calls by returning them within 30 minutes

- Leave clear, complete, and accurate call notes to ensure seamless handoff to sales or service teams

- Uphold Service Beyond Expectation on every single interaction



This role is accountable for call quality, lead accuracy, and appointment success — not just answering the phone.



Secondary Tasks (When Phones Are Quiet)

When call volume is low, you may assist with:

- Light CRM or QuickBooks data updates

- Appointment confirmations

- Calendar updates

- Follow-ups on missed calls or leads

- Administrative support from the Office Manager



Phone coverage always comes first.



Must-Have Qualifications

- Strong phone confidence and professional speaking voice

- Near-native English fluency (verbal and written)

- Reliable availability: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM US Pacific Time

- Ability to multitask systems while speaking with customers

- Calm, solutions-focused customer service mindset

- Strong attention to detail and documentation habits

- Comfortable explaining policies clearly and confidently

- Willingness to follow structured SOPs

- Comfortable using tools like ChatGPT for efficiency



Bonus (Not Required, But Valuable)

- Landscaping, construction, or home services experience

- Aspire CRM familiarity

- Appointment setting or scheduling experience

- Escalation handling experience

- SOP documentation experience



Compensation & Growth

- PHP 40,000/month base salary

- Pay increase opportunities based on performance and tenure

- Long-term stability with a growing company

- Opportunity to grow into expanded administrative or coordination roles



We value reliability, initiative, and accountability.



This Role Is NOT a Fit If

- You dislike live phone conversations

- You prefer quiet, independent back-office work

- You struggle with multitasking while speaking

- You are uncomfortable following structured processes

- You are not available in Pacific Time consistently



How to Apply (Follow Exactly):

Send one
 only to 



Subject: Phone VA – Your Full Name



Include:

1. Resume

2. 2-Minute Audio Recording (Google Drive link)

    * We use the audio recording so we can hear your communication style — since this is a phone-first role.

    * In the recording:

       - Introduce yourself

       - Explain why you are excellent on the phone

    * File name: FirstName_LastName_Audio

       - Incomplete or misformatted applications will not be reviewed.



Why Join Us

- Clear expectations and structured systems

- Direct impact on revenue and customer experience

- Stable long-term role

- Opportunity to grow as responsibilities expand



If you take pride in professional communication and want to be part of a company that values excellence, we’d love to meet you.

title: Facebook Marketplace Deal Finder (Product Research VA for eBay Reselling)
description:
We are looking for a Virtual Assistant to help find 
 items on
 Marketplace that can be resold for profit on eBay.



Your job will be to search
 Marketplace daily and identify products that are listed below their resale value.



You will then check eBay sold listings to determine if the item can be flipped for profit and submit the deal in a spreadsheet.



This role is perfect for someone who enjoys researching products and finding good deals online.



Daily Tasks:

• Search
 Marketplace for 
 items

• Check eBay sold listings to determine resale value

• Calculate estimated profit after fees and shipping

• Send profitable deals in a spreadsheet



We are only looking for deals with at least $40+ profit.



Examples of products to look for:

• Cameras (Canon, Sony, Nikon)

• Gaming equipment (PlayStation, Xbox, VR headsets)

• Networking gear (routers, mesh systems)

• Electronics (headphones, GPUs, audio gear)

• Professional tools (Fluke, Milwaukee, DeWalt)



Requirements:

• Must know how to use
 Marketplace

• Must know how to check eBay sold listings

• Good English communication

• Organized and detail oriented



Pay:

$3–$5 per hour depending on experience.



Hours:

2–4 hours per day.



To apply, please answer these questions:



1. Have you used
 Marketplace before?

2. Have you researched products on eBay?

3. If you saw an item selling for $
 on
 and $220 on eBay, how would you check if it is profitable?

4. Send an example of a product you think could be flipped for profit.



Include the word “EBAYFLIP” in your application so I know you read the job description.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
Social Media Manager (Creative & Brand-Led)

Company: ELY Marketing (Australia)



About ELY Marketing

ELY Marketing is a strategic marketing agency working with premium, travel and tourism and experience-led brands.

We don’t believe in generic content or trend-copying. Our work is grounded in brand strategy, storytelling, and creative execution that feels intentional, elevated, and human.



About the Role

We’re looking for a creative Social Media Manager with a strong eye for branding and an innovative mindset.

This role is for someone who understands that social media isn’t just about posting consistently. It’s about shaping perception, building brand presence, and turning attention into 
ntum.

You’ll be responsible for ideation, content planning, and execution across multiple client accounts, ensuring each brand shows up with clarity, confidence, and consistency.



What You’ll Be Doing

- Developing and managing social media strategies aligned to brand and business goals

- Creating and executing content plans across Instagram,
, TikTok, and LinkedIn

- Identifying trends early and elevating them to fit each brand’s voice and aesthetic

- Writing captions that are engaging, on-brand, and human

- Creating Reels and short-form video concepts

- Designing creatives that resonate with the target audiences

- Managing posting schedules, engagement, and community interaction

- Monitoring performance and adjusting content direction as needed





What We’re Looking For

- Strong creative instincts and a modern, brand-aware aesthetic

- Ability to think conceptually, not just execute tasks

- Deep understanding of Instagram and TikTok trends and formats

- Experience managing multiple client accounts

- Confidence working independently and taking initiative

- Comfortable in an agile environment where we move fast

- Excellent written English and communication skills

- Strong attention to detail and consistency





Tools & Skills

- Experience with Instagram, TikTok,

- Canva (required)

- Video editing tools (CapCut)

- Scheduling tools (Metricool)





Working Arrangement

- Full-time role (40 hours per week)

- Remote position

- Long-term opportunity for the right person

- Work with a collaborative, creative team and premium brands





Portfolio Required

Your portfolio is the most important part of your application.



Please include:

- Examples of social media accounts you’ve managed

- Reels or short-form video examples

- Any branding or elevated content examples

- A brief explanation of your role in the work





Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.



How to Apply

Please include:

- A short introduction about yourself

- A link to your portfolio

- Your availability

- Your expected hourly or monthly salary

title: Spreadsheet P&L Reporting Ecommerce
description:
We run an e-commerce brand in Scandinavia, and need someone reliable to track daily profit for our e-commerce brand.



The Job:

Each day you'll log into Triple Whale and Meta Ads Manager, copy the numbers (revenue, ad spend, costs of goods) and enter them into our spreadsheet. The spreadsheet calculates profit automatically – you just enter the data.



What We Need:

Experience with accounting, reporting and excel 

Comfortable with spreadsheets (Google Sheets/Excel)

Reliable – this needs to be done every day at the same time

Attention to detail



Hours:

30 min - 1 hour per day



To Apply:

Tell us about your experience with profit tracking spreadsheets, previous clients and what softwares you are familiar with.

title: Ecommerce Data & Reporting Assistant (Amazon)
description:
We are looking for a very detail-oriented person with data analysis skills to help our team track and organize ecommerce data for Amazon brands.



This role is for someone who enjoys working with numbers, spreadsheets, and keeping data clean and accurate.



You will work closely with our operations manager and help maintain the systems behind our client reporting.



Main tasks



• Maintain and update spreadsheets with Amazon sales and product data

• Track pricing, bundles, and product experiments

• Keep data clean, organized, and accurate

• Prepare simple weekly reports for internal meetings

• Help keep dashboards and trackers updated



Requirements



• Strong Excel / Google Sheets skills

• Extremely organized and detail-oriented

• Experience tracking and analyzing Amazon sales data (required)

• Able to spot errors or inconsistencies in numbers

• Good written English



This is a long-term full-time role with an opportunity to grow.



Important:

When applying, please include the word “Tracker” in your message so we know you read the job post. Also, briefly explain your experience working with Amazon sales data and spreadsheets.

title: Short Form Editor

Style Reference – Review Before Applying:

Reference Link: 



Your work must align with the pacing, hook strength, subtitle style, and energy shown above.



To apply, submit your portfolio link and editing software used.

title: Funnel Builder (Funnelish) | $5/hr + Bonuses!
description:
About Us

We are a fast-growing, 6-figure dropshipping business, expanding our operations and team. We provide a positive, growth-oriented work environment where you can develop your skills and advance in your career. Join our friendly and supportive team as we scale to new heights!



Position: Funnel Builder (Funnelish)



We’re looking for a talented and detail-oriented Funnel Builder with experience in Funnelish, copywriting, and graphic design. If you have a keen eye for design, persuasive writing skills, and enjoy creating high-converting sales funnels, this role is for you!



Responsibilities:

- Build & optimize high-converting funnel pages for top-selling products

- Design eye-catching graphics using Canva, Photoshop, or Illustrator

- Write persuasive direct response copy to boost sales

- Use Funnelish effectively for funnel building



Requirements:

- Experience using Funnelish (MUST)

- Basic knowledge of direct response copywriting

- Familiarity with Shopify page building

- Graphic design skills (Canva, Photoshop, Illustrator, etc.)

- Strong sense of aesthetics & visual design

- Proactive and eager to improve & optimize funnels

- Team player with good communication skills

- Reliable, meets deadlines, and pays attention to detail

- Passion for learning & self-growth



Salary & Benefits:

- $5 per hour + Bonuses

- Start Date: ASAP

- Fully remote, flexible working hours

- Plenty of learning opportunities



How to Apply:

1) Respond with the word “FUNNELISH” in the subject line to confirm you’ve read this post.

2) Send your CV + portfolio/examples of past work (Funnelish is a MUST)



We are excited to welcome another skilled Funnel Builder to our growing team! Apply today and let’s build amazing funnels together!

title: Funnel Builder wanted for 7-figure Fast Growing Health & Beauty Ecommerce Store
description:
OW HIRING: eCommerce Funnel Builder – Health & Beauty Industry





Are you ready to elevate your skills and make a real impact with a fast-growing Beauty & Health eCommerce brand? We’re looking for a hands-on Funnel Builder who can build and optimize high-converting sales funnels using Funnelish (using Funnelish is a must).



You’ll play a key role in shaping our customer journey, ensuring every funnel is strategically designed to drive performance. Plus, earning up to $100 bonus per funnel, your hard work directly translates into extra earnings!

-Background in eCommerce, preferably dropshipping

title: Pinterest Virtual Assistant / Pinterest Marketing Expert
description:
We are a growing U.S. personalized gift company looking for a Pinterest expert to help grow our traffic and increase sales through Pinterest.



Our products include personalized gifts for weddings, babies, memorials, and special occasions, and we are looking for someone who understands how to create high-performing pins that drive clicks and conversions.



This is a long-term opportunity for someone who understands Pinterest strategy and enjoys helping a brand grow.



Responsibilities



• Create Pinterest pins for our products and blog content

• Design high-converting pin graphics using Canva or Photoshop

• Write SEO-friendly pin titles and descriptions

• Schedule pins using Pinterest scheduler or scheduling tools

• Organize and optimize Pinterest boards

• Research keywords and trending topics on Pinterest

• Help grow monthly Pinterest traffic



Requirements



• Strong experience managing Pinterest accounts for businesses

• Experience creating Pinterest graphics that drive clicks

• Knowledge of Pinterest SEO and keyword research

• Experience with Canva or Photoshop

• Strong attention to detail

• Good written English



Nice to Have



• Experience with ecommerce brands

• Experience with Shopify or Etsy products

• Experience with Pinterest analytics and traffic growth



Position Details



• Remote position

• Flexible hours

• Part-time to start with potential for more hours

• Long-term opportunity



How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:



Links to Pinterest accounts you have managed



Examples of pins you created



Your hourly rate



Your experience with Pinterest SEO



Quick Test (Required)



Please answer the following questions:



1. Pinterest Strategy

If you were trying to promote personalized memorial gifts, what type of pins would you create and why?



2. Traffic Growth

What steps would you take to grow a Pinterest account from 0 to 100,000 monthly viewers?



3. Attention to Detail Test



Please include the phrase:



“Pinterest drives traffic.”



Applications without this phrase will not be considered.

title: Private Equity Analyst
description:
About Duration Group

Duration Group is a long-term private investment firm focused on acquiring mission-critical industrial and consumer services businesses. We take a partnership-oriented approach with the companies we acquire and aim to build a world-class team driven by curiosity, judgment, and long-term thinking.



We are seeking a Private Equity Analyst to join our growing team. This is a long-term role with meaningful responsibility, significant exposure to senior leadership, and the opportunity to help shape the firm from its earliest stages.



Key Responsibilities

• Deal Sourcing & Company Identification

  - Build targeted lists of potential acquisition candidates using criteria such as industry, geography, size, ownership, service offerings, and business model characteristics.

  - Apply judgment to assess whether companies fit Duration Group’s investment criteria.

  - Leverage software tools such as Grata, SourceScrub, & ZoomInfo to find and verify contact information for target company executives



• Industry & Market Research

  - Conduct research on sectors within essential services, industrials, and consumer services.

  - Size markets, analyze industry structures, and identify long-term trends.



• Target Company Analysis

  - Map customer bases, value chains, and competitive landscapes.

  - Summarize findings in clear, concise memos and spreadsheets.



• Pipeline Support

  - Maintain organized sourcing pipelines and databases.

  - Assist with outreach preparation when needed.



Tools & Platforms

Analysts will regularly work with:

• Microsoft Excel, Word, and PowerPoint

• Grata, SourceScrub, and ZoomInfo

Prior experience with these platforms is not required but is a significant plus. Training will be provided.



What We’re Looking For

• Strong research skills and the ability to analyze qualitative and quantitative information.

• Clear written communication and the ability to summarize insights logically.

• Comfort working with spreadsheets, online research tools, and databases.

• High attention to detail and strong organizational habits.

• Intellectual curiosity, sound judgment, and a long-term mindset.

• Ability to work independently and meet deadlines.

• Prior private equity, investment banking, consulting, or deal sourcing experience is not required, but a plus.



Why Join Duration Group

• Work directly with the firm’s founders and have real responsibility from day one.

• Be a foundational member of a growing investment firm.

• Long-term role with significant opportunities for advancement.

• Exposure across deal sourcing, industry research, competitive analysis, and investment evaluation.

• Collaborative, supportive, and high-ownership culture.



As part of this application, please submit a resume as well as a brief description of your experience.

title: OTA Listings & Performance Specialist / Channel Manager (Airbnb, Booking.com, VRBO, Expedia)_OTA Expert_M2026
description:
We are a design-led short-term rental and serviced accommodation company managing high-quality apartments across Central London.



Our properties are listed on Airbnb, 
, VRBO, Expedia and other OTAs, with Guesty as our property management system (PMS).



We are hiring an OTA Listings & Performance Specialist who will also act as our Channel Manager. This role focuses on OTA listing optimisation, performance monitoring, ranking recovery, and multi-channel consistency across all platforms.



This is a core operations role within our team.



This role is for someone with hands-on experience managing Airbnb and OTA listings end-to-end and who understands how listing performance, ranking, and conversion actually work.



––––––––––––––––––––



ROLE SUMMARY



You will be responsible for managing and improving OTA listing performance across Airbnb, 
, VRBO, Expedia and other platforms.



Your job is to:



* Monitor listing performance and visibility

* Identify underperforming or penalised listings

* Optimise listings for SEO and conversion

* D
 when a listing should be optimised, duplicated, relaunched, or left untouched

* Maintain consistency across all OTAs as the Channel Manager

* Protect revenue by spotting issues early



You may also occasionally assist with responding to guest messages through Guesty using our saved replies and ChatGPT to ensure responses remain clear, professional, and consistent with our communication standards.



––––––––––––––––––––



THIS ROLE IS FOR YOU IF:



* You have experience managing Airbnb listings end-to-end

* You understand Airbnb ranking, conversion rate, review impact, and penalties

* You have experience managing 
, VRBO, Expedia or other OTAs

* You understand multi-channel distribution and OTA syncing via a PMS

* You have worked as a Channel Manager or OTA Specialist before

* You know how to optimise listings for SEO on Airbnb and 

* You are comfortable duplicating and relaunching Airbnb listings safely

* You think in systems and performance outcomes, not just tasks

* You can work independently and make judgement-based decisions



––––––––––––––––––––



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



OTA Performance Monitoring



* Monitor Airbnb listing performance and ranking

* Monitor 
, VRBO, Expedia performance

* Identify drops in visibility, enquiries, or conversion

* Assess the impact of reviews and platform signals

* Provide clear recommendations for action



Channel Management



* Act as Channel Manager across all OTAs

* Maintain consistency of content, rules, and settings

* Identify sync issues or platform conflicts via Guesty



Listing Optimisation



* Improve listing SEO and conversion

* Optimise titles, descriptions, amenities and photo order

* Recommend UX improvements including layout clarity and floor plans



Listing Duplication & Relaunch



* Duplicate Airbnb listings correctly and safely

* Support strategic listing relaunches with minimal revenue loss

* Create and optimise equivalent listings on other OTAs



Content & Platform Hygiene



* Use AI tools to draft SEO-optimised descriptions

* Maintain brand consistency across OTAs

* Flag risks, anomalies, or policy changes early



Operational Support



* Occasionally respond to guest messages via Guesty using saved replies and ChatGPT

* Support operational improvements where needed



––––––––––––––––––––



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE



* **Hands-on experience using Guesty PMS (required)**

* Proven experience managing Airbnb and OTA listings end-to-end

* Strong understanding of Airbnb, 
, VRBO, Expedia

* Experience with listing duplication and relaunch strategies

* Excellent written English

* Ability to work independently with minimal supervision



––––––––––––––––––––



BONUS EXPERIENCE (NOT REQUIRED)



* Experience managing SuiteOp to improve operations and guest upsells

* Experience managing multi-property portfolios

* Experience recovering underperforming listings

* Experience managing listings across additional OTA platforms such as Blueground, TravelStaytion, or other short-term rental distribution channels



The more OTA platforms you have experience with, the better.



––––––––––––––––––––



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS

To confirm that you have read this job post carefully, please insert the following phrase in your application "OTA Expert_M2026"



––––––––––––––––––––



REQUIRED APPLICATION QUESTIONS



Applications without answers to all questions will not be considered.



1. Describe a situation where an Airbnb or OTA listing underperformed. What data or signals did you look at and what action did you take?



2. When would you choose to optimise a listing versus duplicating or relaunching it on Airbnb or other OTAs?



3. What do you believe most hosts misunderstand about Airbnb ranking or multi-channel OTA performance?

title: Mortgage Loan Writer | Loan Processor | Credit Analyst | Parabroker - Remote Working from home
description:
Key Details:



• Schedule: Monday to Friday, New Zealand hours

• Work Environment: Secure work from home

• No agency – work direct for the New Zealand company



The Company



Matthew Dawe Mortgages is a New Zealand based young and growing mortgage company. We are passionate about helping clients get finance for their dream home, first home or investment property. We take the stress and confusion out of the mortgage process by helping clients get approved, negotiate with lenders & provide financial advice along the way. After a growth period we need someone to help with analysing client documents, writing deals, proposals & preparing servicing calculators. This involves reviewing & understanding a clients supporting information and packaging this up for presentation to lenders to help the client get approved. There are other credit related tasks such as research & property/security tasks as well as pricing & structure tasks. We have a team of young, happy, high performers, who are committed to their work and who support each other to succeed. 



The Role



We are looking for a gun Loan Writer | Loan Processor | Credit Analyst. You’ll analyse the client’s supporting documents, research lender criteria and package up/ produce a lender proposal/diary note and servicing calculator. Your goal will be to accurately & timely assist the Mortgage broker | Financial adviser to help clients get finance to purchase a home whilst providing excellent attention to detail along the way. 



You will have at least 18 months experience as a Loan writer | Loan Processor | Credit analyst for a New Zealand or Australian based mortgage broker. The right person for this role will know how to package a deal, and can research lender criteria, understand the clients deposit, income, bank statements and other supporting documents, and produce a thorough proposal and servicing calculator. This involves carefully checking your work and following a process. 

Your success will enable us to help more clients, by freeing up/ supporting the Mortgage broker | Financial adviser. Ideally you will have 18 months+ experience as a loan writer analysing client documents, packaging & writing up deals. We are after a self-starter who is driven by constant improving & learning as a personal philosophy, has a high attention to detail and takes pride in their work. This role would suit someone who takes the initiative, is adaptable and can follow a system to a successful result. 



Requirements



• Experience: Proven 18 months+ experience working for a New Zealand or Australian based mortgage broker as a loan writer | loan processor | credit analyst analysing a clients supporting documents, researching lender criteria and packaging up a proposal/diary note & servicing calculators is a prerequisite for this role. 

• Know mortgage loan products, bank platforms, and processes.

• Understand bank/lender policies and procedures.

• Skills: Excellent verbal and written English communication skills

• Attention to detail: Being able to focus

• Characteristics: You are highly ethical, take accountability & ownership of your work 

• Learning & improving as a self-philosophy, being able to ‘dig in’ when the learning/going gets tough to achieve improvement & a well earnt success.

• Ability to follow a process, be adaptable to learn our process, read checklists & watch videos carefully then implement this learning into completing tasks for clients with a high degree of accuracy. 

• Strong computer skills: Strong computer skills are essential 

• Highly organised & proficient at prioritising tasks

• Team player ability to work under pressure & prioritise appropriately. 

• You are smart, detail orientated, have strong sense of pride/checking work and are able to focus. 



Benefits



At Matthew Dawe Mortgages, we ask a lot, which is why we give so much in return. We offer:



• Great pay: 72,000 PHP/month, 40 hours per week, 5am – 2pm PHST (with an hour of breaks, 8 hours worked/day) Monday to Friday 

• Remote working: No travel, work from home

• 13th month Bonus/December Bonus: 1 month salary as a bonus paid in December 

• Public Holidays Day off or Double Pay: - 7 paid days off per year or choose to work these for double pay

• Annual Leave/Paid time off: Additional 5 sick/vacation/annual leave days off per year

• Salary Scales model: Guaranteed salary increases when you hit certain milestones in the role as you progress & learn

• Automated workflow process with description of tasks you need to complete, checklists & videos is all built and ready for you to study, learn & follow. 

• Supportive Culture: Dedicated senior member supporting, providing feedback and answering questions

• Good career opportunity & recognition to progress 

• Small friendly team/ Family environment 



Please only apply if you have a minimum of 18 months+ experience as a loan writer | loan processor | credit analyst for a New Zealand or Australian based mortgage broker, this role is not for VA’s who are only doing mortgage support tasks (such as submitting of completed deals, organising/naming client documents) this is a credit analyst role, you must have experience researching lender criteria and packaging up/ producing a lender proposal/diary note and servicing calculators. 



Please apply if you meet the criteria above and are detail orientated, have strong sense of pride/checking work, are able to focus and are committed to learning more.  



To submit your application, in strict confidence, please apply online using the appropriate link below. Your interest will be treated in the strictest of confidence.



How to apply for this role:

Click the ‘Apply now button’

Answer some basic questions: 



• What role are you applying for? 

• What is your current role, length of time & responsibilities?

• Please explain your experience/current role in how it relates to the criteria for this position which is a prerequisite of this role. 

• Why are you looking for a new role? 

• Are you available to start full time straight away? When can you start? 

• Do you have a degree or qualification? Name the qualification & what field is this in? 

• We are looking for someone who is smart, committed to learning/ improving and can carefully check their work for accuracy as is a adaptable. Why do you think you would be good for this role?



Send your Resume to 
 with the subject line job title

title: Leasing + Property Operations VA (US LTR) – Part-Time (9AM–1PM ET)
description:
We’re hiring a reliable VA with real US long-term rental (LTR) leasing/property management experience. You’ll run lease-up and keep PM ops moving (maintenance coordination, rent follow-ups, turnovers) using RentRedi + simple trackers.

Portfolio includes 2 mid-term rentals (average stays ~2 months). STR is used only to fill vacancies (not full-time hosting).



PAY / STARTING RATE

- If you already have the skills to run lease-up + rental ops with minimal training: PHP 22,000–30,000/month

 - If significant training is required: PHP 18,000/month for the first 30 days, then moves into the PHP 22,000–30,000 range based on performance



No bookkeeping. No QuickBooks.



WHAT YOU’LL DO

- Lease-up: inquiries -> showings -> applications -> screening -> lease signing -> move-in

- Rental ops: maintenance coordination + rent follow-ups + turnovers

- Keep trackers updated daily (portal-first communication)



MTR/STR (Light Support – When Needed)

- Template-based guest messages (pre-arrival/check-in/checkout)

- Turnover coordination (cleaner scheduling + checklist + photos)

- Escalate urgent issues to the manager



REQUIREMENTS

- Philippines-based

- Proven US LTR leasing/rental ops experience (Airbnb-only is not enough)

- Strong written + spoken English (video required)

- Reliable internet + backup connection

- Comfortable with a 5-minute live call for finalists



Voice + Work-from-Home Experience (Non-negotiable)

- At least 12 months BPO/call center experience OR 12 months voice-heavy customer support experience (inbound/outbound calls)

- At least 6–12 months work-from-home experience with a proven stable setup

- Backup internet required (pocket Wi-Fi or second ISP)

- Quiet workspace + headset



Not a fit if: first-time work-from-home VA, Airbnb-only experience, or no backup internet.



HOW TO APPLY (REQUIRED)

Put PM031526 on the first line of your OLJ message, then include:

1. Confirm schedule works (Mon–Fri 9AM–1PM ET, no overlap job)

2. Years of US leasing/LTR rental ops experience + tools used (RentRedi/AppFolio/Buildium/etc.)

3. Lease-up steps (6 steps)

4. Maintenance coordination steps (5 steps)

5. Confirm you meet the voice/WFH requirement (BPO/voice-heavy role + WFH experience + backup internet)

6. VIDEO LINK (Required): 90 sec–2.5 min using the script below (say PM031526 at the end)

7. RESUME LINK (Required): attach in OLJ or Google Drive link to PDF (set sharing to “Anyone with the link can view”)

8. Weekend triage (be specific):

    You start Monday 9:00 AM ET and see these 3 messages came in:

    A) Prospect: “Is it available? Can I see it today?”

    B) Tenant: “Kitchen sink leak is getting worse.”

    C) Tenant: “I’ll pay rent Friday” (rent is 5 days late).

    In your reply, give:

   The order you handle A/B/C and why (one sentence)

   The exact first message you send for each (A, B, C)

   What you would log in the tracker for each (status + next action + due date)

   Keep it under 200 words.



VIDEO SCRIPT (90 sec–2.5 min)

Name + City/Province + confirm schedule (Mon–Fri 9–1 ET)

One lease-up you handled + your steps

Maintenance coordination steps + follow-up to completion

Late rent follow-up cadence + how you log promises-to-pay

Internet speed + backup + why you’re great at follow-up/trackers

End: “My application code is PM031526.”
