title: Director of Operations (Property Management and Real Estate Experience Required)
description:
!!! URGENT HIRING !!!



Description:

We’re looking for an experienced and results-driven Director of Operations with a strong background in both the Property Management and Legal industries.



This is a senior leadership role — not an assistant or VA position. We need someone who has managed people, built systems, and driven measurable results across teams for companies. You’ll oversee operations, refine processes, and ensure that the business runs efficiently day to day.

If your background is limited to administrative work, appointment setting, or managing Airbnb units, this role is not for you. We’re specifically seeking someone who has operated at a management or director level within property management and legal operations.



Key Responsibilities:

- Oversee and optimize daily workflows across multiple departments.

- Develop and implement systems, SOPs, and processes that drive efficiency.

- Manage and mentor tea
mbers to achieve performance goals.

- Analyze operational challenges and design data-driven solutions.

- Maintain accountability across projects, timelines, and deliverables.

- Oversee documentation, communication flow, and performance reporting.

- Coordinate between property management and legal teams to ensure smooth operations.

- Support executive leadership with strategic planning and execution.



Qualifications:

- Minimum 3 years of proven experience in both Property Management and Legal Operations (required).

- Prior leadership or management experience, overseeing teams and workflows.

- Deep understanding of property management systems, legal operations, and compliance processes.

- Strong command of English (written and spoken). Must be Advanced/Fluent in English. We do not accept conversational English speakers.

- Excellent leadership, communication, and problem-solving skills.

- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and capable of independent decision-making.

- Proficient in CRMs, workflow management, and reporting tools.



Preferred (but not required):

- Experience creating or improving SOPs and automations.

- Familiarity with property management software (Buildium, AppFolio, RentManager, etc.).

- Prior experience managing cross-functional or remote teams.



Personality Fit:

- We’re looking for someone who:

- Takes ownership and pride in their work.

- Thrives in a fast-paced, results-oriented environment.

- Doesn’t wait to be told what to do, they anticipate what needs to be done.

- Holds themselves and their team accountable for outcomes.



Employment Type: Full-time, long-term position.

Work Hours: Must be flexible with U.S. (EST) business hours. 

Work Schedule: M-F 9-5 PM EST

Compensation: Competitive, based on experience and seniority.



Please apply directly to this job ad.

To apply:

Subject line should be the position only. Example: “Director of Ops Application.” Nothing less, nothing more.

Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.

title: Ecommerce Merchandising & QA Specialist (Sports Apparel, Full-Time, Long-Term)
description:
This is a long-term full-time role with room to grow in responsibility and compensation. We plan to do a formal performance review after the first 90 days based on accuracy, judgment, reliability, responsiveness, and ownership. Based on performance there is the opportunity to increase salary above the starting $1,100.



Schedule



Full-time (40 hours/week)

Remote, long-term

Must provide meaningful overlap with U.S. Eastern Time during agreed working hours.

Weekend flexibility is a plus.



About Us



We are a U.S.-based ecommerce company that builds online apparel and merchandise collections for sports teams, schools, and community organizations.



We move quickly, care a lot about quality, and are building a repeatable workflow that helps stores launch fast.



We are a small team building something real. If you like clean systems, fast launches, and catching details other people miss, you will probably enjoy this role.



Overview



We are looking for a dependable full-time operator who can review artwork, make merchandising and product decisions, route design revisions when needed, approve cleaned files, trigger final production, and QA collections before they go live.



This is not a graphic design role.

This is not a customer support role.

This is an operations + merchandising + QA role.



What You’ll Do



review incoming logos and generated artwork options in our dashboard



choose the best usable artwork version



d
 whether a file can move forward as-is or needs cleanup by our design team



d
 which apparel colors a logo can go on based on contrast, readability, and visual quality



d
 which products the logo is a fit for



d
 whether the logo is suitable for embroidery



classify the logo type when needed (for example: crest, badge, shield, mascot, script, wordmark, emblem)



write clear revision notes for the production designer when cleanup is needed



review cleaned artwork when it comes back from design



approve it for final production or send it back with clear notes



trigger the final production step in the dashboard



QA the final collection and confirm products, mockups, and collection information are accurate before it goes live



Improve the System



We do not only want someone who follows the workflow. We also want someone who can help us improve it.



If you notice recurring errors, unclear rules, bottlenecks, or ways to make the process faster and more accurate, we want you to speak up and help us refine the system.



Examples of the decisions you’ll make



a red logo with no white outline may not work on a red shirt



a very detailed mascot may work for printing but not for embroidery



a logo may look better as a large center-chest design versus a left-chest design



a phone case, blanket, or flag may need a background color chosen from the logo palette so the product looks intentional



Hard Skills



strong written English



strong visual judgment



product QA / detail checking



comfort making repeated ecommerce or merchandising decisions quickly



ability to follow SOPs and leave clear notes for downstream teams



comfort working inside a dashboard / queue-based workflow



reliable high-speed internet



a backup plan for internet or power outages



Nice to Have



apparel merchandising



ecommerce product setup



catalog QA



sports/team/school merchandise experience



familiarity with embroidery limitations and print limitations



experience with logos, contrast/readability decisions, or product presentation



Soft Skills



highly detail-oriented



reliable



organized



fast without being careless



comfortable making decisions



able to communicate clearly and briefly



willing to follow a checklist and improve with feedback



What This Role Is Not



no original logo design



no customer support



no open-ended creative work



no full graphic design production work



Turnaround Expectations



Fast turnaround matters in this role. Our goal is to help launch stores within one business day. During agreed working windows, new tasks should be reviewed promptly and moved through the workflow without unnecessary delay. You should be comfortable working from a queue and helping us keep launch timelines on track.



Trial



We will start with a paid practical trial using real examples. The trial is used to assess judgment, accuracy, written communication, and consistency. If the fit is strong, this becomes an ongoing full-time role.



How to Apply



Please send:



A short introduction about your background



Your experience with ecommerce, product QA, apparel, merchandising, or visual decision-making



Your time zone and the hours you can work



A sentence confirming that you are comfortable with a paid practical trial



Short answers to these questions:



A. A logo is mostly red and the selected shirt colors are red, black, white, and gray. How would you d
 which shirt colors to approve?



B. A customer uploads a logo with a very thin, light-yellowscript font intended for a white t-shirt. What is your immediate decision, and what specific note do you leave for the design team if you d
 it needs a revision?



C. Describe a role where you had to make fast judgment calls and check details carefully.



D. Tell us about a time you improved a process, checklist, or workflow instead of only following it.



E. Are you comfortable in a long-term full-time role that may grow with the business?



Please begin your application with the words: Red Jersey

title: Full-Cycle Medical Biller (Remote) – Only Serious Applicants (30 AP Required)
description:
We are looking for top-tier medical billers — the ones who know their skills, take ownership, and deliver results every single day. If you are serious about building a long-term career in Revenue Cycle Management (RCM) and thrive on full accountability for the entire billing process, read on.



This is not a role for the average biller. We want the best of the best — professionals who can handle everything from prior authorizations and claim submissions to AR follow-ups, denials, and appeals.



Here’s how we know you’re serious:

	•	You must spend 30 credits to apply. This shows commitment, confidence, and that you’re ready to invest in yourself.

	•	Only candidates who meet our experience requirements and submit a personal, thoughtful response (no AI!) will be considered.



Requirements:

	•	5+ years of verified medical billing experience

	•	Proven ability to manage full-scope revenue cycle independently

	•	Excellent English communication skills

	•	Honest, dependable, and passionate about medical billing

	•	Background check and education verification



What You’ll Get:

	•	Remote setup provided: Remote Desktop, RingCentral, EMR access — everything you need to succeed

	•	Performance-based pay: $2.50/hour + $2.50 per paid claim — your earnings grow directly with your results

	•	Paid 30-minute break every day — because we respect your time and focus

	•	Career growth: Top performers can move into advanced RCM or leadership roles

	•	Family-owned culture: We value excellence, integrity, and rewarding those who deliver



How to Apply:

	•	Tell us in your own words why you’re confident in your skills and why you’re the best fit for this role

	•	Only candidates who invest 30 credits and demonstrate authentic experience and commitment will move forward



We only hire professionals who are confident in themselves and their abilities. If you hesitate or misrepresent your experience, this role is not for you.

We need a developer who can build premium, conversion-focused Shopify stores AND create photorealistic AI product images that look like they came from a professional photo studio.

YOU MUST HAVE ALL OF THESE:

??????????????????????????????

title: Remote sales admin
description:
POSITION

Strike Deployment Officer (SDO) / Remote sales Admin VA

ROLE TYPE

Full-Time Position

COMPENSATION

Hourly Pay

$5 – $8 per hour + Bonus

Gross Monthly Pay

$800 – $1,300 USD (?44,800 – ?72,800 PHP approx.) plus bonus 

Gross Annual Pay

Performance Bonuses

• Weekly deal bonuses ranging from $5 – $30 per closed deal

• Annual performance bonus ranging from $500 – $800 USD (?28,000 – ?44,800 PHP approx.)

Responsiveness Bonus

$30 per month (?1,680 PHP approx.) for maintaining strong responsiveness outside normal

working hours.

Sunday Planning Meeting Bonus

$10 per week (?560 PHP approx.) for attending the weekly Sunday planning meeting.

All working hours are tracked and logged using Clockify.

WORK SCHEDULE

Primary Work Hours

Monday – Friday

8:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST

Weekly Tea
eting

Mondays between 8:00 AM – 10:00 AM PST

Sunday Planning Meeting

1-hour meeting between 5:00 PM – 9:00 PM PST

Used to prepare for the Monday tea
eting and organize priorities for the upcoming week.

PROBATION PERIOD

All new hires will complete a 14-day probationary period.

During this period we will train on workflows, systems, communication style, and expectations.

The probation period allows both sides to confirm the role is a strong fit.

ROLE OVERVIEW

The Strike Deployment Officer (SDO) / Personal Assistant works directly with the Sales

Executive to keep sales operations organized, efficient, and moving forward.

This role combines administrative support with sales operations coordination. You will primarily

work 1-on-1 with the Sales Executive managing leads, CRM data, scheduling, proposals,

agreements, and operational tasks that help move deals from lead to close.

This is a full-time operational role that requires strong organization, responsiveness, and

comfort working with business software.

CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

 Management

• Manage multiple inboxes related to company operations

• Organize messages, prioritize conversations, and assist with replies when needed

CRM & Lead Management

• Maintain and update Zoho CRM

• Track lead status, deals, and customer records

• Keep detailed notes on conversations, proposals, and deal progress

• Identify high-priority opportunities that need follow-up

Scheduling & Calendar Coordination

• Manage the Sales Executive’s meeting schedule

• Schedule calls, follow-ups, and appointments

• Maintain a clean and organized calendar

Proposal & Agreement Preparation

• Prepare proposals using company templates

• Assist in preparing agreements and contracts

• Work with AI tools to generate customized agreements when necessary

• Track sent proposals and deal status

Task & Project Organization

• Maintain organized systems for tasks and company initiatives

• The SDO may choose preferred task management software

• The company will cover the cost of the software if approved

• Trello is preferred but alternatives may be used if agreed upon

COMMUNICATION EXPECTATIONS

This role requires very strong responsiveness.

Requirements include:

• Highly responsive during working hours

• Available to respond quickly when contacted outside working hours when necessary

• Clear communication and consistent updates on tasks and progress

WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR

This role is best suited for someone who:

• Enjoys working with CRMs and administrative software

• Likes organizing systems and digital workflows

• Understands how deals, proposals, and agreements work

• Is comfortable with basic math, profit, and cost calculations

• Can review contracts and understand basic agreement terms

• Is comfortable using AI tools to assist with document creation and organization

• Is highly organized and detail oriented

WORK ENVIRONMENT

This role works directly with the Sales Executive in a fast-moving sales environment.

Organization, communication, and reliability are critical.

This is a high-trust role where strong performance can lead to long-term opportunities and

increased responsibility as the company grows.



PLEASE SEND A QUICK VIDEO INTRO ABOUT YOURSELF 

THANKS FOR APPLYING

title: Chargeback Manager
description:
The Role

You'll be our go-to person for handling chargebacks and payment disputes end to end — from gathering evidence to submitting compelling responses and tracking outcomes. You'll work directly with our operations team to improve processes and reduce dispute rates over time.



What You'll Do

- Monitor and respond to chargebacks, disputes, and fraud alerts across all payment processors

- Build strong representment cases with order data, tracking info, communication logs, and policy documentation

- Track dispute outcomes, identify patterns, and recommend process improvements

- Coordinate with our fulfillment and customer service teams to gather evidence quickly

- Help maintain a low chargeback ratio to protect our merchant accounts

- Stay current on card network rules (Visa, Mastercard) and platform-specific dispute procedures



What We're Looking For

- Proven experience handling chargebacks and payment disputes, specifically in a dropshipping or e-commerce environment

- Strong working knowledge of Shopify, including its order management and dispute tools

- Fluent English — written and spoken — since you'll be drafting professional dispute responses

- Detail-oriented with strong organizational skills

- Able to work independently



How to Apply

Send us a brief message explaining your experience with chargebacks in e-commerce, along with your approximate win rate if you have one. Use word Duces to start your message. Send your resume + experience.

- You must be able to talk and type at the same time, as well as ensure accuracy in notes.



Other tasks can be assigned as needed. 



ABOUT YOU:

Excellent Customer Service skills with great communication skills.

Ability to follow detailed processes and call intake scripting.

Great attitude and teamwork mentality.

Very organized and high-level attention to detail.

Hardworking and likable since you will be working closely with Potential New Clients and other tea
mbers.

* 13th month bonus - you will get an extra month’s pay at the end of the year, which will be prorated depending on how long you have been with me



About Me:

We are a criminal defense firm based in Austin, Texas. We focus heavily on client success and serving customers right. Your duties will involve both of these.



To Apply for the job:

 me at

.

Do not write more than what I have asked you above as attention to detail and following instruction are essential functions of this position.



Thank you!

title: Airbnb Virtual Assistant / Property Manager (Guesty)_OTA Expert_M2026
description:
We are hiring an experienced Airbnb Virtual Concierge / Virtual Property Manager to join our growing short-term rental operations team.



We manage high-quality, design-led serviced apartments across Central London, listed on Airbnb, 
, VRBO, and Expedia. This role is for someone who truly understands short-term rental operations end-to-end — not just guest messaging.



This is a core operations role with real ownership, clear systems, and long-term growth potential. It is not a junior role and not a general VA position.



If you enjoy running complex operations smoothly, preventing issues before they escalate, and taking pride in doing things properly, this role will suit you.



––––––––––––––––––

PLEASE ONLY APPLY IF YOU HAVE REAL STR EXPERIENCE



This role is not suitable for beginners or general virtual assistants.



You must have hands-on experience working in short-term rentals / Airbnb operations and be comfortable managing daily operations independently.



––––––––––––––––––

REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE (READ CAREFULLY)



You must have:



• Proven experience working as an Airbnb VA, Virtual Concierge, or Virtual Property Manager

• Hands-on experience using Guesty and Asana in a real operations role

• Strong understanding of STR operations, including:

– Cleaning turnovers and laundry coordination

– Maintenance scheduling and follow-ups

– Calendar, availability, and reservation management

– Guest access, travel-time, and check-in planning

– Full guest journey management (pre-arrival to checkout)

• Experience communicating with Airbnb Support / Trust & Safety on the host side

• Experience working with multiple OTAs (Airbnb, 
, VRBO, Expedia)

• Confident use of ChatGPT and AI tools for guest communication and operational tasks

• Ability to coordinate between tea
mbers to fulfil guest upsell requests, such as early check-in, late checkout, mid-stay cleans, sofa bed setup, and similar operational requests

• Excellent written English and a strong understanding of UK hospitality standards

• Experience using SuiteOp or similar guest experience / upsell management tools is a big bonus



Experience with UK-based serviced accommodation is a strong advantage but not mandatory.



If you do not meet these requirements, please do not apply.



––––––––––––––––––

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



Guest Support & Virtual Concierge

• Handle guest enquiries, arrivals, and in-stay issues

• Troubleshoot Wi-Fi, smart locks, heating, access, and property questions

• Draft clear, on-brand guest messages using ChatGPT

• Maintain accurate communication records in Guesty



Operations & Logistics (Primary Focus)

• Schedule and coordinate cleaners and laundry

• Review cleaning photos and carry out quality-control checks

• Assign and track tasks for the master housekeeper / handyman

• Track supplies, invoices, and operational expenses

• Liaise with maintenance providers and follow tasks through to completion

• Maintain accurate calendars and availability in Guesty

• Coordinate between tea
mbers to fulfil guest upsell requests such as early check-in, late checkout, mid-stay cleaning, sofa bed setup, and additional services

• Manage and track upsell requests through SuiteOp or the relevant system, ensuring they are delivered accurately and on time



Monitoring & Risk Prevention

• Monitor Ring CCTV footage and Minut noise alerts

• Verify guest count and potential house-rule breaches

• Take first operational action when issues arise

• Escalate confirmed issues to the relevant specialist role when required



Deposits, Reviews & Escalation

• Send and release security deposits where no issues arise

• Escalate deposit disputes and damage cases to the specialist role

• Draft public-facing review responses using ChatGPT



Reporting & Improvement

• Assist with basic operational reporting

• Suggest improvements to SOPs, workflows, and systems based on real operational insight



––––––––––––––––––



IDEAL CANDIDATE PROFILE



You are someone who:



• Has real, hands-on experience using Guesty and Asana in STR operations

• Is comfortable owning daily operations without step-by-step instructions

• Is highly organised, detail-oriented, and reliable under pressure

• Is calm, solutions-focused, and confident making operational decisions

• Is excellent at using ChatGPT and AI tools in day-to-day work

• Understands how to structure prompts to control tone, clarity, and accuracy

• Understands how guest upsells translate into operational tasks and can coordinate cleaners, housekeepers, and schedules to deliver them smoothly

• Enjoys improving systems, not just following them

• Communicates clearly when something is unclear and asks good questions

• Is punctual, dependable, and looking for a long-term role, not freelance work

• Bonus: Previous experience working with Airbnb on the host-support side



––––––––––––––––––

POSITION DETAILS



Hours: 40 hours per week

Schedule: Monday to Friday, UK daytime (occasional evening coverage if required)

Type: Full-time, long-term, remote



––––––––––––––––––

HOW TO APPLY (IMPORTANT)



Apply via OnlineJobs.ph only.



Please answer all four questions below in your application.

Applications missing any of these will not be reviewed.



We value clarity, structure, and practical thinking. Short, well-written answers are preferred over long explanations.



1. Relevant Work Experience

   Provide a brief summary of your relevant work experience in short-term rental / Airbnb operations (roles, years of experience, and types of properties managed).



2. Guesty & Asana Experience

   Summarise your hands-on experience using Guesty and Asana, including what you used each tool for in daily operations.



3. AI & Prompting Skills

   Briefly explain how you use ChatGPT or other AI tools in your work, and how you structure prompts to achieve accurate, professional outcomes.



4. IQ Test Score

   Include a screenshot or link to your OnlineJobs.ph IQ Test score:

   
/quiz/iq-test/



To confirm attention to detail, include the phrase “OPS-M2026” somewhere in your application.

title: Social Media Content Creator and Marketing Strategiest
description:
Who We Are

NewDay Child Coaching is an online coaching group — not a clinic — built on something that, as far as we know, no one else is doing. We are a Physical Therapist, an Occupational Therapist, and a Speech-Language Pathologist. Three disciplines. Three professional lenses. Three distinct voices.



But here's what makes us different: we're also friends. And because of that friendship, we're able to do something most multidisciplinary teams never achieve — we blend our different perspectives together into one clarifying voice, for the benefit of the infants, toddlers, and families we serve.



We serve families during the critical 0–36 month developmental window, empowering parents to become the expert for their own child. We are soon launching a new developmental framework and a corresponding coaching app — and we need our social media presence to grow alongside that mission, so more families can find us.



Our growing community of NewDawns™ — that's what we call our families — spans
 (16,000+ followers), Instagram, TikTok, Threads, and YouTube. If you're someone who believes that the right message, on the right platform, at the right time can genuinely change a family's life — we want to talk to you.



The Role

We're looking for someone who lives and breathes social media — not just someone who can post, but someone who understands WHY different platforms demand different content styles, tones, and timing. You'll be working directly from a detailed Social Media Strategy Toolkit we've already built, executing content plans, engaging with our community, and helping our brand voice stay consistent and warm across all channels.



This is not a set-it-and-forget-it posting role. This is a relationship-building, brand-nurturing, community-growing role. A key part of that growth is expanding our
 subscriber base — converting our existing 16,000+ followers into an active, subscribed audience that hears from us first and stays connected to our mission long-term.



What You'll Do

Execute weekly and monthly content calendars across
, Instagram, TikTok, Threads, and YouTube

Create and schedule posts (graphics, captions, short-form and long-form video concepts) using provided tools and brand guidelines

Engage meaningfully with comments, DMs, and community posts — especially on our
 page (16K+ followers) and
 Channel

Actively support the growth of our
 subscriber base — implementing strategies that convert followers into subscribers and keep our most engaged audience connected

Adapt content strategy per platform: 
munity building, TikTok trends and short-form video, Instagram Reels and Stories, Threads conversational content, YouTube long-form and Shorts

Repurpose long-form content (blog posts, course content) into snackable social posts

Draft caption copy in our established brand voice — warm, expert, parent-first

Monitor trends and flag relevant opportunities for timely content

Compile a simple weekly performance snapshot (engagement, reach, follower growth)

Collaborate with our founder during weekly check-in meetings via video call

Support giveaway campaigns, product launch posts, and community events (digital prizes only)



Platforms & Tools You'll Use

Platforms:
 (primary), Instagram, TikTok, Threads, YouTube

Design: Canva (required) | Video editing: CapCut minimum; DaVinci Resolve or Adobe Premiere Pro highly valued

Scheduling: Meta Business Suite and/or Buffer/Later

Communication: Trello for task tracking, Jibble for time tracking, Wise for payment

AI tools: Claude.ai — we provide a comprehensive strategy toolkit for you to work with Claude to accelerate content creation



What We're Looking For

REQUIRED:

Proven experience managing social media accounts for a business or brand (please include links or portfolio)

Deep understanding of platform-specific strategies — you know
 is NOT 
, and you create accordingly

Strong written English — warm, clear, and conversational

Proficiency in Canva for graphics and basic design

Reliable internet connection and a consistent work schedule

Comfortable working independently using provided systems and strategy guides

Strong attention to detail — brand consistency matters deeply to us



NICE TO HAVE (not required, but will help you stand out):

Experience in the health, wellness, parenting, or early childhood space

Video editing skills — CapCut is the minimum bar; DaVinci Resolve or Adobe Premiere Pro will move you to the top of our list

Knowledge of
 subscriber/follower growth strategies — how to grow a page organically, increase reach, and convert followers into an engaged community

Experience running or managing
 Groups, Community pages, or
 Channels

Familiarity with YouTube strategy — channel growth, Shorts, community tab, SEO for video

Familiarity with SEO basics as they relate to social content

Experience using AI tools (like Claude.ai) to accelerate content creation — we already have a system for this



About the Pay & Hours

We've done our homework on fair pay for this role. Here's our thinking:



Hourly Rate: Starting at $4.00 USD/hour

$4.00/hr is our entry starting rate — it reflects an honest starting point for a new contractor relationship

Your rate grows with you: demonstrated platform knowledge, a strong portfolio, consistent delivery, and real engagement results will be rewarded with pay increases

We are not looking for the cheapest hire — we are looking for the RIGHT hire who will earn more as they prove their value

Pay is processed twice monthly via Wise — on the 15th and the 30th



Hours Per Week: 15–20 hours to start

Content planning and calendar management: ~3–4 hrs/week

Content creation (graphics, captions, repurposing): ~4–6 hrs/week

Scheduling and posting across platforms: ~2–3 hrs/week

Community engagement (comments, DMs, group interaction): ~3–4 hrs/week

Performance tracking and weekly reporting: ~1–2 hrs/week

Team check-in meeting: ~1 hr/week

Strong performers may grow into a full-time role (30–40 hrs/week) as our course platform and content needs expand



Time tracking is done through Jibble. You'll be paid for the hours you work — no more, no less.



Our Culture & What We Expect

We want to be straightforward with you:

We are a small but mighty team. Everyone on the NewDay team shows up with heart, communicates proactively, and cares deeply about our families — our NewDawns™.

We are looking for someone who is in it for the long haul. If you are looking for a quick gig, this is not the right fit. We invest in our team and we expect the same commitment in return.

Reliability is non-negotiable. We do not work with people who ghost, disappear, or stop communicating. If something comes up, you talk to us — that's how a team works.

Social media marketing must be your genuine passion — not just a job you fell into. We can tell the difference, and so can our audience.

We expect consistent availability during agreed-upon hours and timely responses within 24 hours on business days.

We provide detailed systems, strategy guides, and brand toolkits — you will never be left guessing what to post or how.

We value creativity within structure. We have a brand voice and visual identity; we want you to bring that to life, not reinvent it.



A note about AI-generated applications:

Please do not use AI to write your application responses. We use AI tools extensively in our own workflow — so we know exactly what AI-generated writing looks and sounds like. We want to hear YOUR voice, YOUR experience, and YOUR genuine interest in this role. Applications that read as AI-generated will not move forward.



How to Apply

To be considered, please submit the following:



1. A brief introduction (3–5 sentences): Who are you, and why is this role a good fit for you?

2. Links to 2–3 social media accounts you've managed (business or brand pages — not personal pages)

3. Your answer to this question: What makes
 content strategy different from 
 content strategy? (2–4 sentences is fine)

4. Your availability (days/hours per week and your timezone)

5. Your desired hourly rate



Applications that do not include all five items above will not be reviewed. We're a detail-oriented team — this is our first test of that.



Subject line: Social Media Specialist Application — [Your Name]

title: Virtual Dental Assistant – Insurance Verification & Administrative Support
description:
We are seeking a reliable and detail-oriented Virtual Dental Assistant to support our dental practice with insurance verification and administrative tasks. The primary responsibility will initially be dental insurance verification, with opportunities to assist with additional front office tasks such as claim follow-ups, billing support, and scheduling as the role grows.



Key Responsibilities:

 • Verify dental insurance benefits and eligibility for upcoming patient appointments

 • Document insurance details accurately in patient charts

 • Assist with insurance claim follow-ups and billing inquiries

 • Communicate with insurance companies regarding coverage and benefits

 • Support appointment scheduling and other front office administrative tasks as needed

 • Maintain accurate and organized records within the practice management system



Software:

Our practice uses Open Dental as our practice management software. Experience with Open Dental is a plus, but not required. We are happy to train the right candidate who has experience working in a dental office environment.



Qualifications:

 • Prior experience working in a dental office (front desk, insurance verification, or billing preferred)

 • Familiarity with dental insurance plans, benefits, and verification processes

 • Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

 • Reliable internet connection and ability to work remotely

 • Excellent communication skills and professionalism



Ideal Candidate:

We are looking for someone dependable, proactive, and comfortable working independently in a remote environment who can grow into additional administrative responsibilities over time.



If you have dental office experience and enjoy supporting a team behind the scenes, we would love to hear from you.

title: Social Media Lead Generation Specialist
description:
Full-Time | Remote | $1,000–$1,600 + Performance Bonuses



We are a U.S.-based online education company that enrolls students into professional certification programs such as IT certifications, cybersecurity, and project management (PMP).



We are looking for a high-performing Social Media Lead Generation Specialist who knows how to turn social media attention into real prospects and scheduled calls with our admissions team.



This role is not just posting content. Your success will be measured by appointments generated and prospects who show up to speak with our team.



If you are a marketer who understands funnels, engagement, and lead generation, this can be a long-term opportunity with a growing U.S. company.



What You Will Be Responsible For



Your primary goal is to generate qualified prospects through social media and convert them into booked calls with our admissions team.



Daily responsibilities include:



• Creating and scheduling engaging social media content

• Generating inbound leads through organic marketing

• Managing comments, messages, and inquiries from prospects

• Converting social media interest into scheduled admissions calls

• Running outreach campaigns and engagement strategies

• Creating short-form content (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

• Monitoring lead activity and reporting daily results

• Working closely with our sales team to coordinate booked calls



Platforms You Will Work With



•

• Instagram

• TikTok

• LinkedIn

• YouTube Shorts



Experience with paid social advertising is a plus but not required.



Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who:



• Has real experience generating leads from social media

• Understands marketing funnels and audience targeting

• Is reliable, disciplined, and results-driven

• Communicates clearly in English

• Is proactive and brings new marketing ideas

• Is comfortable working with a U.S. team



Bonus if you have experience marketing:



• Online courses

• Education programs

• Certification training

• Professional services



Required Skills



• Social media marketing

• Lead generation strategy

• Content creation

• Basic analytics and reporting

• Copywriting for engagement and conversion



Helpful tools (not required):



• Canva

• CapCut

• Meta Business Suite

• CRM systems (Salesforce, HubSpot, etc.)

• Zapier or marketing automation tools



Compensation



Base Salary:

$1,000 – $1,600 per month depending on experience.



Performance Bonus:

$10 for every qualified appointment that shows up for a scheduled call with our admissions team.



A strong performer can earn significant monthly bonuses by consistently generating booked calls.



Work Schedule



Full-time position

40 hours per week

Remote



Must be dependable and responsive during scheduled working hours.



To Apply



Please include the following in your application:



Links to social media accounts or campaigns you have managed



A brief explanation of how you generate leads from social media



A short 1–2 minute video introduction

title: Job Title: [Urgent] Hybrid VA – Phone Intake & Video Editor-light Admin (GoHighLevel experience))
description:
About the 
 Water Prowash



We are looking for a highly skilled, tech-savvy Virtual Assistant to join our team. This is a dual-focus role in a relaxed atmosphere. You will be the first point of contact for our customers (Voice) and the creative engine behind our social media and YouTube presence (Video/SEO/AEO).   We are a USA based home service company.  We offer house washing, power washing, and paver patio restoration.  Very active type videos.  



Key Responsibilities

1) Phone & CRM: Answer incoming calls with a clear, neutral accent. You will be responsible for answering incoming calls, filling out website intake forms, and updating our CRM.  Customer call volume varies from 1-10 calls a day.  Same from website intake forms.



2) Content Creation: Edit raw footage into high-quality videos & posts for YouTube, Insta,
, TikTok etc.  Researching keywords, "people also ask" or similar, researching what ai and voice search is looking for to help rank our media and map pack. SEO, AEO & Marketing: Research and apply effective keywords, titles, transcripts and descriptions to all video uploads to maximize reach. 

You will be asked to go back to previous media and update seo/aeo, transcripts etc.

This is our YouTube link:

Upload content and manage the Social Planner.

Enter customer or prospect information from incoming calls and website forms.



We will work together to learn GHL to ensure leads are moving through our GHL workflows and automations.  We have 2 software paid programs to help us learn more. This is not a high priority at the 
nt. No experience necessary at this time but willing to learn.

5) You will need to login/logout with the employer everyday along with what is being worked on, what was completed and what the employer needs to do.  You may create a form to send on WhatsApp.



6) We will discuss or the employer may provide a list of tasks for each day.   The employer may ask you to stop your current task to do another then you may return to the current task after the immediate task has been completed.  Tasks must be flexible.

Required Qualifications

2) Transferring phone lines from GHL..



Learning  social media, keywords SEO/AEO and how to use keywords/answer questions to drive traffic.

************************************************************************************************* 

HOW TO APPLY  ( Follow These Steps and answer the questions-you may copy and paste the question then answer)

To be considered for this position, please reply with the following:



1)  A link to your Video Portfolio (Show us your best edits from raw footage).  

The owner takes many photos and videos for you to produce high converting video & posts on social media including YouTube.



2) A 60-second or more voice recording introducing yourself and describing your experience with GoHighLevel, Intake phone customer service and how you may have helped another employer.

 ** Provide a recording in the
 or with a link.

     Do you have rank tracking software? Not mandatory but useful.



3a) Do you have a way to keep working on a project if the employer asks you to record a webinar at the same time?



3b)  What editing software do you utilize?  

Are you willing to learn other editing software programs? 

Are you willing to learn ai  programs?  We have a paid software program to help us learn.

6) Do you have a Google drive?

How much space do you have on your drive? 

The employer utilizes their drive sparingly.  We use the drive to share photo/video approvals and other admin tasks.  You will be asked to give employer ownership to any new folder.



7) Explain your proficiency with Google sheets/docs.  Not mandatory but you may complete minor admin duties.



This position is proactive on many occasions especially in the summer months.  The owner may not have immediate availability to answer questions, but will return any questions as quickly as possible. 

Winter months (October - February) the owner has more availability, one on one or quicker response time.  

Summer months (Mid March- mid October) has less due to working in the business./slower response time



Pay is every two weeks.  You will need to sign up for Payoneer. 

Onlinejobs offers you a bonus if you sign up thru their site.

Please state your requested hourly salary in USD.



Hours: 8a.m. - 4:00/4:30 p.m. EST Monday-Friday summer hours (you will be answering the phone during business open hours)

Winter hours are more flexible as we do not provide home service business during cold weather.



Seasonal business:  You will work full time March-October with over time availability.  Winter hours November through February you will have part time hours and/or you may find another job during that time.  You will be asked to come back for the following season with a returning bonus.



Bonuses: 

Return following year bonus, contact customers and ask for reviews (if a review is given on a platform you receive a $5 bonus), outstanding eye catching videos, flexible if time off is needed occasionally with prior notification (Philippine holiday, family) and more.



We thank you for your interest in working with Clear Water Prowash.  Please feel free to ask any questions in your reply. This is a low key supportive environment, but fast paced at times.



Put the word "UNICORN" and your name in the subject line so I know you read this entire post.
salary: Discussed based on level of experience.

title: Virtual Assistant – Google Dropshipping (Shopify | Product Listing | Customer Service)
description:
We run a Google dropshipping e-commerce business and are looking for a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to join us from the ground up. We're in the launch phase — there's serious work from day one, and we want someone who is reliable, fast, and takes ownership.



The Role:



Your core responsibilities will include:



- List and optimize products on Shopify (titles, SEO titles, descriptions, pricing, images)

- Process and track customer orders

- Handle customer inquiries via
 professionally and promptly

- Communicate and coordinate with Chinese suppliers via WhatsApp

- Maintain accurate records in Google Sheets

- General VA tasks — supporting the team with whatever is needed at that 
nt



We're a small, hands-on team. Some days that means focused product listing, other days it means jumping in wherever the business needs you. Flexibility and a can-do attitude are essential.



Software You'll Use Daily:



- Shopify

- Google Sheets / Excel

- Gmail

- WhatsApp (supplier & team communication)

- ChatGPT and Claude (occasionally Higgsfield for specific tasks — primarily Nano Banana Pro)

- Photoroom



You must have hands-on experience with the core tools. You will be asked to demonstrate this during the interview.

Requirements:



- Minimum 1–2 years of experience as a VA in e-commerce or dropshipping

- You have worked with SOPs before and know how to follow them precisely

- Strong written English communication skills

- Comfortable communicating with Chinese suppliers

- Fast, reliable internet connection

- Quiet, professional workspace — no background noise

- No other full-time job at the 
nt

- Available to start immediately



We provide clear SOPs for all processes — but we expect you to hit the ground running. This is not a role where we teach you the basics. You should already understand how e-commerce and dropshipping works.

If you do not meet ALL of the above requirements, please do not apply.



What We Offer:



- Competitive hourly rate based on experience

- Weekly payments

- Full-time from day one — the first weeks will be intensive with plenty of work

- Hours may vary slightly as the business develops, but this is a long-term full-time position

- Communication via WhatsApp to start, evolving into broader team tools as we grow

- Direct communication — small team, no corporate layers

- We're early-stage and scaling fast — the people who join now grow with us. As the business expands, so does your role and responsibility. This is a real opportunity to grow into a senior position within a fast-moving company



How to Apply:



To confirm you've read this post carefully, include the word "mango" somewhere in your application. Additionally, record a short Loom video (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself and showing us your Shopify experience. Candidates without a Loom video will not be prioritized.

title: AI Video Editor + Content Creator (TikTok & Amazon)
description:
We are a US-based e-commerce company with 3 active brands in health, wellness, and beauty — with a 4th launching soon. We sell on Amazon, Shopify, and TikTok Shop. We need an AI video editor who can create photorealistic lifestyle images AND compelling videos using AI tools — content that stops the scroll on TikTok and converts on Amazon.



?? IMPORTANT — READ BEFORE APPLYING

You MUST submit BOTH a completed still image AND a video with your application. Missing either = not reviewed. You must own ALL your own AI tool subscriptions — do not apply if you need us to provide them. Begin your application with the word ACTION so we know you read this entire post.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:

- Create AI-generated photorealistic lifestyle images from real product photos

- Animate images into videos using Kling AI, Runway ML, or Pika Labs

- Edit TikTok-ready vertical videos in CapCut — hooks, captions, trending music

- Produce Amazon horizontal video ads (15-30 seconds, clean and professional)

- Repurpose one product clip into multiple formats per brand

- Deliver 5-10 polished video assets per week across 3 brands



YOU MUST HAVE ALL OF THESE:

- AI image generation — Midjourney, Adobe Firefly, Leonardo AI, or similar

- Ability to create photorealistic AI images — models and scenes that do NOT look AI-generated

- Photoshop — compositing, retouching, lighting corrections

- AI video tools — must already know and actively use Kling AI, Runway ML, or Pika Labs

- CapCut proficiency — hooks, captions, transitions, trending TikTok formats

- Experience creating product lifestyle videos for e-commerce brands

- You must own ALL your AI tool subscriptions — do not ask us to provide them

- Portfolio of actual AI product videos and images you have already made



NICE TO HAVE:

- Adobe Premiere Pro or After Effects

- Experience with health, supplement, or wellness brands

- Understanding of TikTok trends, hooks, and viral formats

- Amazon video ad experience



??????????????????????????????

TEST TASK — TWO STEPS REQUIRED

??????????????????????????????



All reference files are here — download and study all three before starting:

???? 



The folder has: (1) Studio photo of real product, (2) Hand-holding photo, (3) Render for reference only.



?? PRODUCT ACCURACY IS THE #1 THING WE EVALUATE.

The bottle in your image and video must match the REAL photos exactly. Do NOT use the render. Do NOT use stock footage. Do NOT use outside product images.



THE BOTTLE MUST MATCH EXACTLY:

- Metallic silver label — most critical detail

- Dark/amber bottle with black ridged cap

- Compact size — not tall and thin

- Label readable: REGENVITY NAD+ PERFORMANCE FORMULA

- Blue stripe: SCIENCE-BACKED INGREDIENTS

- 60 VEGETARIAN CAPSULES at label bottom

- Wrong bottle = immediate fail regardless of video quality



STEP 1 — CREATE THE STILL IMAGE FIRST:

Create a photorealistic lifestyle image showing this exact scene —

A man or woman aged 45 or older at a kitchen counter. Holding the Regenvity NAD+ bottle in one hand. Other hand bringing a capsule to their mouth as if taking it. Pickleball gear visible on the ground nearby — paddle, bag, or shoes. Feel: active, healthy 40s-60s person doing their morning ritual before heading out to play.



?? AGE IS NON-NEGOTIABLE: Model must appear 45 or older. This is a cellular energy and healthy aging product — a young model does not fit. Think active, fit, vibrant 50-something — not elderly, not young. If model looks under 45 the image fails regardless of everything else.



Image quality requirements:

- Person must look like a real human — not AI-generated

- Bottle label accurate and readable

- Bright, clean kitchen — professional lighting

- Minimum 2000x2000px

- If we can tell it is AI at first glance it does not pass



STEP 2 — ANIMATE INTO A TIKTOK VIDEO:

Using your Step 1 image, create a 15-30 second lifestyle video:

- Person takes their morning capsule at the kitchen counter

- Pickleball gear visible on the ground nearby

- They finish, grab their gear, and head toward the door — energized and ready

- Feels like a real person's morning — not a commercial, not stock footage

- Stops the scroll in the first 3 seconds



Format requirements:

- Vertical format (9:16) for TikTok / Instagram Reels

- Captions and background music added in CapCut

- Must look like it could run as a paid TikTok ad today



HOW TO SUBMIT:

Share your own Google Drive or Dropbox link to BOTH your still image AND your video directly in your application. Set to "Anyone with the link can view." Tell us which AI tools you used for both the image and video and why. Missing either the image or video = not reviewed.



This is a two-part test for a reason. Anyone can make a basic video. Very few can make a photorealistic AI image AND turn it into a compelling TikTok video. If you can do both, you will stand out immediately.

title: Video Software Application Builder
description:
The Project

We've built a web app that automates video production. It's live, in production, and producing real videos across multiple channels but contains a HUGE amount of bugs / failures / inconsistencies.

Think of it as an automated video factory: you feed it a topic, and the system researches, writes a script, generates voiceover, creates/finds visuals, assembles everything with FFmpeg, and outputs a finished video with thumbnails.



The app has 7 different video pipeline types, a full React UI with 30+ pages, and integrates with 15+ external APIs (AI models, text-to-speech, image/video generation, transcription, etc.).

We need help building out new features, fixing bugs, and improving the pipeline.



Tech Stack



- Backend: Node.js, Express, TypeScript

- Frontend: React 18, Vite, Zustand, Tailwind CSS

- Database: SQLite + Prisma ORM



What You'd Work On



- Building/debugging pipeline steps and features

- Improving API integrations and error handling

- Frontend UI improvements

- Performance optimization of video processing pipelines

- Building a queue/orchestration system for parallel pipeline runs



What We're Looking For

Must-have:



- Strong TypeScript + Node.js

- React experience



Big plus:



- FFmpeg knowledge

- Prisma ORM experience

- Remotion or video processing background





How We Work



- Communication via chat (English or Dutch)

- Development happens directly on the server and GitHub

- We use AI coding tools (Claude Code) to speed up implementation

- Features are specced out before building

- Test on staging, then merge to production

- Direct, no-nonsense communication — we focus on shipping





Compensation

Negotiable. Open to hourly, per-feature, or retainer. Send your rate with your application.



Apply

Send a short message with:



- Your relevant experience (keep it brief)

- What interests you about this project

- Your availability and rate

title: Brand Manager + Strategist (Multi-Brand E-Commerce)
description:
We are a US-based e-commerce company with 3 active brands in health, wellness, and beauty — with a 4th brand launching this year. We sell on Amazon, Shopify, and TikTok Shop. We need a Brand Manager + Strategist who can do two things: run day-to-day operations across all brands AND think strategically — developing new products, building brand identities, and creating growth plans that actually move the needle.



This is a real leadership role. You report directly to the owner. We want someone who thinks like a brand builder, not just a task manager.



?? IMPORTANT — READ BEFORE APPLYING

You MUST complete the written test task at the bottom of this post. Applications without completed answers will not be reviewed. Begin your application with the word LAUNCH so we know you read this entire post.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Brand Strategy & Product Development:

- Research market trends and identify new product opportunities in our niches

- Analyze competitors on Amazon and TikTok to find gaps we can win

- Build go-to-market launch plans for new products from concept to live listing

- Propose new product ideas with supporting research and reasoning

- Help define content strategy for each brand — what to create, for whom, and why



Brand Coordination & Operations:

- Manage content calendars and posting schedules across all 3-4 brands

- Ensure all content stays on brand across TikTok, Instagram, Amazon, and Shopify

- Coordinate the video editor, graphic designer, listings VA, and web developer

- Track deadlines and deliverables — follow up without being asked

- Report weekly to the business owner with clear updates and strategic recommendations



TikTok Shop & Social Media:

- Oversee TikTok Shop setup, product listings, and day-to-day management

- Recruit and manage TikTok affiliate creators to promote products

- Monitor social performance and identify what content is driving sales

- Stay on top of TikTok trends relevant to health, beauty, and wellness



Systems & Team Management:

- Build SOPs so the team can work independently

- Set up and manage ClickUp for task tracking across all brands

- Handle day-to-day operations and customer escalations

- Support Shopify store updates and Amazon listing coordination



YOU MUST HAVE ALL OF THESE:

- Experience managing multiple e-commerce brands or clients simultaneously

- Proven ability to develop brand strategy — not just execute tasks

- TikTok Shop experience — setup, listings, and affiliate recruitment

- Strong research skills — market analysis, competitor research, product opportunities

- Amazon Seller Central or Shopify experience (must know at least one)

- Excellent written English — reports, briefs, and strategic recommendations

- Self-starter — you bring ideas and solutions without being asked

- Available for partial overlap with US Eastern Time



NICE TO HAVE:

- Experience launching new products on Amazon from scratch

- Klaviyo or
 marketing experience

- AI tools experience — ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity for research

- Basic Canva or graphic design skills

- Health, beauty, or supplement brand experience

- Experience writing product briefs or brand guidelines



??????????????????????????????

TEST TASK — 4 QUESTIONS REQUIRED

??????????????????????????????



You will be managing and growing all 3 of our brands. Review each on Amazon before answering — your answers should show you actually looked at them:



???? Regenvity NAD+: 

???? Avilana: 

???? O Nutritions: 



Answer all 4 questions. Keep total answer to 1 page or less. Quality of thinking matters more than length.



QUESTION 1 — WEEK 1 LAUNCH PLAN:

You are Brand Manager on Day 1. What are the 5 most important things you set up or do in Week 1 to get Regenvity NAD+ live on TikTok Shop and Amazon? Be specific — not generic.



QUESTION 2 — TEAM COORDINATION:

Our team has a video editor, AI image designer, and listings VA. Launch is in 30 days. How do you organize their Week 1 work? What does each person do and in what order?



QUESTION 3 — NEW PRODUCT IDEA:

Based on what you see in our 3 brands and their niches, suggest ONE new product we should consider launching. What is it, who is the target customer, and why would it sell? Show your thinking — not just the idea.



QUESTION 4 — TIKTOK CONTENT STRATEGY:

Give us ONE specific TikTok content idea for Regenvity NAD+ that would perform well with the 45+ active adult audience. Describe the scene, the hook (first 3 seconds), and why it works for this specific customer.



HOW TO SUBMIT:

Share a Google Doc link or paste your answers directly in your application message. If sharing a Google Doc set it to "Anyone with the link can view" before submitting. Applications without all 4 answers will not be reviewed.



We are looking for someone who thinks like a brand builder and executes like an operator. If that is you, we want to hear from you.

title: Real Estate Transaction Coordinator
description:
Real Estate Transaction Coordinator



Location: Remote

Employment Type: Full-Time / Contract

Industry: Real Estate



Job Overview



We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Real Estate Transaction Coordinator to support our real estate team by managing transactions from contract to closing. The Transaction Coordinator will ensure that all documents, deadlines, and communication between clients, agents, lenders, and title companies are handled efficiently.



The ideal candidate has experience working with real estate contracts, transaction timelines, and compliance requirements and can manage multiple transactions simultaneously while maintaining accuracy and strong communication.



Key Responsibilities

Transaction Management



Manage real estate transactions from contract to closing



Ensure all required documents are completed and submitted on time



Maintain transaction timelines and track important deadlines



Review contracts and supporting documents for completeness



Client & Partner Coordination



Communicate with buyers, sellers, agents, lenders, and title companies



Schedule inspections, appraisals, and closing appointments

Ensure compliance with brokerage and regulatory requirements



Contract Processing

Track contingency deadlines



Ensure all required signatures and documentation are obtained



Administrative Support



Assist agents with transaction-related tasks



Manage checklists and task tracking for each transaction



Maintain organized records for audits and compliance



Required Skills & Qualifications

Experience



1–3 years experience as a Transaction Coordinator or Real Estate Administrative Assistant



Experience working with real estate contracts and transaction timelines



Technical Skills



CRM or transaction management platforms (Dotloop, SkySlope, Lofty, Follow Up Boss, etc.)



Document management systems



Microsoft Office or Google Workspace



Basic real estate contract knowledge



Soft Skills



Strong attention to detail



Excellent organizational skills



Ability to manage multiple transactions simultaneously



Strong communication skills



Ability to work independently and meet deadlines



Preferred Qualifications



Experience working with a real estate brokerage or real estate team



Knowledge of purchase agreements, disclosures, and compliance requirements



Familiarity with MLS systems



Experience with real estate closing processes



Daily Activities



Review and process new contracts



Update transaction files and checklists



Communicate with agents and clients



Monitor transaction deadlines



Coordinate with title companies and lenders



Ensure closing documents are completed

title: Remote Ticket Audit & Billing Specialist
description:
We are a growing Canadian transportation company looking to add a Ticket Audit & Billing Specialist to our remote team in the Philippines. You will work alongside our existing Philippines team and our Canadian operations staff to ensure freight tickets, rates, and invoices are accurate and processed on time. This role is critical to maintaining billing accuracy and protecting company revenue.



Key Responsibilities

Audit freight tickets and load documentation to ensure accuracy before billing

Verify that correct contract rates are applied to each haul

Identify missing or incorrect charges such as fuel surcharge, wait time, detention, or other accessorial fees

Prepare and send customer invoices accurately and on time

Monitor and track rate changes and customer-specific billing rules

Reconcile dispatch records, tickets, and billing data

title: Credit Repair / Inquiry Removal Specialist
description:
Credit Repair / Inquiry Removal Specialist



We are hiring a full-time " Credit Repair / Inquiry Removal Specialist " for a system-specific role inside our FundHub operation. This is not a generic VA position. You will be working directly inside  DisputeFox ,  GoHighLevel , and  Airtable  to manage inquiry-removal and credit-repair tasks in a structured round-based workflow. Our system uses GHL for task routing and status control, Airtable for ops tracking and inquiry logs, and DisputeFox for repair-side execution and repair round movement.



This role is heavily phone-based. You must be comfortable taking calls for most of the day, especially with  Experian  , and also handling  Equifax  and  TransUnion when needed. In some cases, you may need to manage multiple live bureau conversations or handoffs at the same time, so you must have a good headset, strong audio quality, fast reactions, and the ability to stay calm under pressure. The system is designed around bureau-specific call sessions, live handoff readiness, retry handling, and write-back tracking, so phone confidence is a real requirement here.



What you will do



- Handle inquiry removal and credit repair support work inside our live operating system

- Work inside DisputeFox to track repair activity and round movement

- Work inside GoHighLevel to manage statuses, tasks, ownership, and next actions

- Work inside Airtable to keep inquiry logs, case notes, and ops records clean and accurate

- Take bureau calls throughout the day, mostly Experian

- Speak with Experian, Equifax, and TransUnion professionally and persistently

- Be ready to handle more than one live bureau call/handoff situation when needed

- Follow the exact workflow for inquiry cases, fraud alert checks, and file progression

- Keep records updated correctly after every action so the next tea
mber has clean data

- Escalate blockers fast and communicate professionally with the team



## Non-Negotiable Requirements



- Must have real experience with DisputeFox

- Must know GoHighLevel

- Must know Airtable

- Must be comfortable taking phone calls most of the day

- Must have a professional headset and clean call audio

- Must be comfortable speaking with Experian, Equifax, and TransUnion

- Must be able to stay organized while handling multiple tasks or live call situations

- Must be professional, reliable, and detail-oriented

- Must not be working for another company

- Must be available full-time and focused during working hours

- Must follow SOPs exactly and keep confidential client information secure



Best fit for this role



You are a strong fit if you already understand credit repair operations, know how to move files through a system without creating errors, and are comfortable doing repetitive but important phone and admin work at a high standard. This role is for someone who can sit down, take calls, update systems correctly, and keep cases moving all day.



How to apply



Please send:



- Your resume

- A short summary of your experience with DisputeFox, GoHighLevel, and Airtable

- A short voice note or message explaining your experience speaking with the credit bureaus

- Confirmation that you are not currently working for another company

- Confirmation that you have a quality headset and are comfortable taking calls all day



## Screening Questions



1. How many months or years have you used DisputeFox?

2. What credit repair work have you personally handled?

3. Have you ever spoken directly with Experian, Equifax, or TransUnion?

4. Are you comfortable being on calls for most of the workday?

5. Do you currently work for any other company or client full-time?

6. What experience do you have with GoHighLevel?

7. What experience do you have with Airtable?

8. Do you have a noise-free workspace and a professional headset?

title: Experienced Video Editor to Join a Growing Healthcare Brand
description:
Full-Time Video Editor – ($20 USD / Video with ~4 videos per week)



About Us

CERA Ear Clinic is Chicago's first dedicated ear health and wellness clinic. Since opening in September 2025, the clinic has grown rapidly, and we're now investing in scaling our social media presence to position CERA as the leading voice in ear health and wellness. Visit our website at 
 to learn more about who we are and what we do.



The Role

We're looking for a full-time video editor to join our team and take ownership of our content pipeline. You'll be editing and publishing content every other day across Instagram, TikTok, Youtube shorts and Linkedin, working closely with the clinic founder to build a recognizable, authoritative brand.



We currently have around 1,000 followers and are focused on accelerating growth through consistent, high-quality content and paid social campaigns.

Content Types You'll Be Editing



1. Expert Commentary (Talking Head)

Professional, well-produced videos featuring the clinic's provider sharing ear health knowledge and tips. We've invested in professional video production equipment and want these to feel polished, authoritative, and engaging — think subject matter expert, not generic health content.



2. Ear Cleaning & Reaction Videos

Footage captured directly from our 4K clinical camera during ear cleaning procedures, as well as reaction-style content responding to other ear cleaning videos. These are high-performing, visually compelling clips that require sharp editing instincts — knowing what to cut, when to zoom, and how to pace for maximum engagement.



3. Day-in-the-Life & Brand Storytelling

Behind-the-scenes videos and photos that humanize the clinic and help viewers build a personal connection with the brand. These should feel authentic and approachable while still looking professional.



What You'll Do

Edit and deliver 3–4 videos per week across all three content types

Average length of 1 minute per video

Create, edit, and optimize viral content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts and LinkedIn

Add captions, text overlays, transitions, sound design, and music in line with CERA's brand aesthetic

Ability to collaborate on content strategy and brainstorm new ideas for content

Receive feedback on video edits on 



What We're Looking For



Strong portfolio demonstrating short-form video work (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

Proficiency in Descript (our main software for talking head videos). CapCut, Adobe Premier Pro or equivalent editing software also helpful

Excellent sense of pacing, storytelling, and visual composition

Understanding of what performs well on social media — trends, hooks, retention techniques

Reliable, responsive communicator

Detail-oriented and able to work independently with minimal supervision

Comfort receiving feedback (using 
) to create high-quality content

Experience with healthcare, wellness, or personal brand content is a plus but not required



What We Provide



All required software licenses for video editing

Raw footage, scripts, and creative direction for each piece of content

A collaborative environment where your creative input is valued and encouraged

, Instagram, and LinkedIn.

title: Temporary Legal File & Evidence Organization Assistant
description:
Seeking a highly organized virtual assistant to help organize digital documents and evidence for a legal matter.



This is a short-term project focused on sorting and organizing files into structured folders. The assistant will help review file names, categorize documents, and ensure all materials are placed into the correct folders according to provided instructions.



Responsibilities include:



• Organizing financial documents into labeled folders

• Renaming files according to a structured naming system

• Sorting documents such as bank statements, credit card statements, and real estate records

• Assisting with organizing text message screenshots, audio files, and videos into designated folders

• Creating a clear evidence index listing all documents in each folder

• Ensuring files are organized in a clear and professional structure for attorney review



Attention to detail and strong organizational skills are extremely important.



Experience with Google Drive, Dropbox, or similar file systems is preferred.



This project involves sensitive information, so confidentiality and professionalism are required.

title: Experienced Credit Repair Customer Service
description:
Customer Service Representative (Full-Time)



Company: Lyle Consulting LLC

Position Type: Full-Time

Hours: 40 hours per week (8 hours per day)



About Us



Lyle Consulting LLC is a fast-growing credit repair and funding company focused on real results, strong systems, and long-term client relationships. We are building a serious, structured team and are looking for long-term partners, not short-term freelancers.



You will be part of an established operation with clear SOPs, support, and growth opportunities.



Responsibilities



As a Customer Service Representative, you will be the primary point of contact for clients after they enroll. Your role is to maintain clear communication, organization, and client satisfaction while following company SOPs.





Client Communication

==================================================

Responding to inbound client messages via SMS,
, and CRM



Answering client questions about:



Credit repair process timelines



Dispute cycles and expectations



Required documentation



Account status updates



Providing professional, clear, and confident communication at all times



Account & Case Management



Reviewing client accounts and notes before responding



Requesting missing documents and follow-ups when needed



Uploading and organizing client documents in the CRM



Escalating issues to management or disputing team when necessary



Updating client notes accurately after each interaction



Retention & Follow-Ups



Following up with inactive or unresponsive clients



Reducing chargebacks and cancellations through proper communication



Ensuring clients understand the process and remain engaged



Supporting renewals and long-term client retention



Upselling Clients On New Services



Calling them to ensure no problems





Daily Workflow

============================

Following company SOPs exactly



Managing assigned ticket queues or message inboxes



Maintaining response time standards



Handling a high volume of client conversations daily





Requirements

==================================

Prior customer service experience required



Very fluent English, written and spoken



Strong communication and problem-solving skills



Excellent organization and attention to detail



Reliable internet connection and computer



Ability to work independently and meet daily productivity goals



Strong work ethic, accountability, and professionalism



Team-oriented mindset





Strongly Preferred (May Affect Hiring Decision)

============================================

Good English Accent (Dosen't have to be perfect but at least sound fluent so around B2-A2 Mastery)

Experience in credit repair, funding, or financial services



Experience using GoHighLevel or similar CRM



Experience handling sensitive client information





What We Offer

==================================

Full training with detailed SOPs provided



Long-term job security



Structured, supportive team environment



Performance-based incentives and bonuses



Growth opportunities into senior customer service or operations roles



Company incentives such as bonuses and potential company getaways



You are treated as a long-term partner, not just an employee





How to Apply (Very Important)

-------------------------------------------------------

To be considered, all applicants must submit the following:



A detailed written explanation of why you are a strong fit for this role



Short or generic applications will not be considered



A Loom video or short introduction video explaining:



Your customer service experience



Any experience in credit repair or financial services



Why you are seeking a long-term role



Submitting a video significantly increases your chances of being hired.



We are only interested in serious applicants who want stability, growth, and a long-term role with a structured company. If you are disciplined, detail-oriented, and client-focused, we would love to hear from you.

title: High-Performance Executive Operator (Data & Operations)
description:
This is not a traditional Executive Assistant role.



We are looking for a high-performance operator who can combine data intelligence with operational execution and work directly alongside a fast-moving, visionary leader.



This role is for someone who can bring structure to data, clarity to decisions, and execution to leadership initiatives.



If you thrive in fast environments, think analytically, and operate with ownership, keep reading.



Who We Are:



DAP Brands is a community of high performers building businesses that create real impact.



Our leadership team moves quickly, thinks strategically, and expects people to take responsibility rather than wait for instructions.



We value:

• Speed

• Accountability

• Emotional maturity

• Precision

• Ownership

• Loyalty to the mission (not ego)



What This Role Really Is:



This role combines Data Analysis + Executive Operations.



Your first responsibility is to bring order to data across the organization: Cleaning, structuring, and translating it into clear insights.



Once the data foundation is organized, you will operate as a high-level executive, helping leadership execute faster and smarter.



You will help:



• Clean, organize, and analyze business data

• Turn raw data into meaningful reports and insights

• Support leadership with decision-ready information

• Protect your leader’s time and priorities

• Enforce accountability across leadership initiatives

• Translate strategy into structured execution

• Identify problems before they become fires

• Move initiatives forward without constant direction

• Bring clarity to complex situations



You will sit close to leadership.

You will see how decisions are made.

You must handle that with professionalism, discretion, and maturity.



What This Role Is NOT



This role is not for someone who:



• Needs constant praise or reassurance

• Struggles with direct feedback

• Prefers slow corporate environments

• Gets overwhelmed by changing priorities

• Waits for instructions instead of solving problems

• Is uncomfortable working with data and systems

• Frequently job hops every year



We operate in a high-accountability environment.



If you need tone cushioning or excessive structure, this will likely feel uncomfortable.



What Success Looks Like (First 90 Days):



Within your first 90 days, you:



• Organize and clean key business data sets

• Create structured reporting for leadership decisions

• Build dashboards or reports that bring visibility to operations

• Run leadership meetings with clear structure and follow-through

• Anticipate your leader’s needs before they are spoken

• Track priorities and ensure accountability across teams

• Bring solutions instead of just raising issues

• Operate calmly and clearly under pressure



The Profile That Thrives Here



You likely:



• Have experience in data analysis, reporting, or business analytics

• Are comfortable working with spreadsheets, dashboards, and structured data

• Have supported a founder or senior executive before

• Have stayed 3+ years in at least one meaningful role

• Enjoy solving complex operational problems

• Can build systems and workflows from scratch

• Communicate clearly and directly

• Are emotionally regulated and professional under pressure

• Think in outcomes and insights, not just tasks



You are someone who:



• Notices patterns others miss

• Brings clarity where others see chaos

• Moves things forward without being asked twice



Compensation & Growth:



This role offers:



• Competitive compensation aligned with performance

• Direct exposure to executive decision-making

• The opportunity to shape internal systems and operations

• Long-term growth as the company scales



At DAP Brands, we reward impact and ownership, not just tenure.



Final Note



This role is for someone who wants to build, solve, and operate at a high level.



If you enjoy working with data, solving operational problems, and supporting leadership execution, this could be an excellent fit.



If you're looking for a comfortable, slow-paced corporate role, this probably isn't it.



But if you want to operate at a high level and help build something meaningful, apply on our website 
/careers and write MAVERICK before your name.
