title: Integrations Associate – Automation & Systems
description:
DAP Brands is seeking a detail-oriented, technically savvy, and solution-driven Integrations Associate to support our mission of building seamless, scalable automations across the organization. This role goes beyond task execution. You’ll work closely with our Technology Integration Manager to design, maintain, and optimize workflows that improve efficiency across Sales, Marketing, and Operations.



If you enjoy connecting systems, solving process gaps, and leveraging automation tools to create reliable, intelligent workflows, this role is for you.



Key Responsibilities:

- Integration Setup & Maintenance: Assist in setting up, testing, launching, and maintaining integrations using platforms such as Zapier, Make, and GoHighLevel. Monitor automations for accuracy and performance, troubleshoot issues, and implement long-term fixes.

- Automation & Workflow Optimization: Identify inefficiencies in existing processes and propose smart automation solutions. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand needs and build tailored workflows.

- Technical Support: Work with APIs, webhooks, and basic scripting (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL) to resolve data sync issues, system errors, and performance bottlenecks.

- Documentation & Training: Document workflows, integrations, and processes to ensure scalability. Assist in training internal users on newly built systems and automation tools.



Tools You’ll Work With:

- Automation & Integrations: Zapier, Make, Webhooks

- CRMs & Operations Tools: GoHighLevel, ClickFunnels, Stripe, ClickUp

- Collaboration Tools: Google Sheets, Zoom, Google Workspace

- Scripting & APIs: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL



Application Instructions:

Please submit your application through the online form provided: 



- To be considered, you MUST type “MAVERICK” in front of your full name if you are applying via our website: 

- If you are an Integrations Associate who takes ownership, thinks in systems, and thrives in a fast-moving, automation-driven environment, we invite you to apply.

s and administrative correspondence

Young Publisher |

mbers worldwide and 200+ verified reviews with a 4.9 average rating.

We don't disappear, we pay on time



We're looking for a talented Canva Designer with strong AI image generation skills to join our creative team!



BENEFITS:

- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Competitive salary (40,000 PHP first month + performance-based bonuses)

Looking forward to seeing your creative portfolio!



The Young Publisher Team



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Senior Analytics Engineer (Financial Data & Reporting) — Power BI / SQL / Data Modeling
description:
Senior Analytics Engineer

IMPORTANT: Candidates who don't complete Round-1 are NOT considered.





Why this role exists

Turn messy operational data into clean models, deterministic validations, reconciled outputs, and executive-ready evidence—so leadership can file on time, pass reviews, and make decisions with confidence. You’ll move quickly from MVP to repeatable, low-touch workflows.



What you’ll do (outcomes)

1. Model & Validate: Build tidy star-schema models; write rule-based checks (completeness, allowed values, tie-outs, negative/zero policies) that prevent bad data from shipping.

2. Reconcile: Prove totals reconcile to control numbers; maintain balance ? flow bridges; keep exceptions at zero by close.

3. Evidence-ready outputs: Produce clean, fixed-layout exports and one-page views that hold up under review.

4. Cadence & reliability: Own refresh schedules, light automation for deadline windows, and receipt/acknowledgment capture.

5. Iterate to MVP: Ship weekly increments, simplify the path to first-pass acceptance, and reduce manual touches.



Must-have qualifications

1. SQL + data modeling: Built analysis-ready models; can explain grain, joins, lineage.

2. Validation mindset: You write acceptance-grade rules (uniqueness, ranges, null policies, reconciliations) and block releases when controls fail.

3. Power BI competence: Data model + core DAX + clean pages; can wire simple RLS and test it.

4. Clarity & artifacts: Concise written English; tidy notes; reproducible steps.

5. Portfolio/snippets: PBIX/SQL/screenshots + a short “what changed & why” note.



We welcome adjacent profiles: strong Data Engineers with modeling/quality chops, or Power BI Analysts who write SQL and adopt modular/dbt-style patterns. If you’re great at rules and reconciliations, we’ll teach the missing bits.



Nice-to-have

- Modular SQL transforms (dbt-style).

- Expectation-style data-quality tests and exception reporting.

- Basic orchestration/automation (scheduled refresh, light UI automation, receipt capture).

- Finance literacy (control totals, variance basics).



System requirements

- Windows 10/11, Power BI Desktop, 16GB RAM (recommended minimum), stable internet ?25 Mbps.



How we work

- Async-first, low meetings: clear runbooks, quick reviews, Ship > Talk.

- Short loops: weekly deliverables that reduce rework and manual effort.

- Ownership: you propose controls, not just visuals.

- Microsoft-first, lean stack: we teach specifics.

- Acceptance bar (used in trials & ongoing work)

- Models reconcile to control totals within tolerance.

- All validations green at file time; exceptions cleared with notes.

- Evidence pages export cleanly (pagination, labels, links).

- A trained teammate can reproduce the flow at 5PM on close day.



30/60/90 milestones

Day 30: Core transaction slice modeled; ?10 validation checks; one exceptions view.

Day 60: Balance-to-flow tie-outs operational; daily variance view.

Day 90: Coverage/adequacy slice packaged with artifacts; light automations for deadline windows.



Compensation & schedule

- Core availability 2:00–8:30 PM EST; 8:30–10:30 PM EST (As-needed window). Pay applies to meetings + assigned build work only.

- Contractor, target ~$5-7 USD/hour.



How to apply (required)

- Complete a short, free Round-1 audition (30-60 min, offline).

- We provide a small regulatory-reporting sample dataset plus context.



You submit:

- A rules list (what you’d validate and why)

- A compact transform plan (SQL-like or pseudo-dbt)

- One clean Power BI page (PBIX) with a brief reconciliation note

- A 90-sec Loom walk-through showing your PBIX and transform logic



Applicant Keywords

Power BI, DAX, SQL, Star Schema, RLS, Data Modeling, ETL/ELT, Data Validation, Reconciliation, Paginated Export, Automation, Analytics Engineer, Data Engineer

 paid advertising campaigns across
 and Instagram.



This role is ideal for someone who understands performance marketing and enjoys improving campaign results through testing, optimisation, and data-driven decisions. You will work closely with our team to launch campaigns, test creatives, and improve lead quality while keeping costs efficient.



What You’ll Do



• Build, launch, and manage
 and Instagram ad campaigns

• Test campaign structures, audiences, placements, and retargeting strategies

• Monitor campaign performance and optimise based on performance data

Bonus if you have experience with:



• Lead generation campaigns

• Marketing agencies or service-based businesses

• Real estate or local business advertising



Requirements

title: Senior Video Editor (Full-Time | Remote)
description:
We’re looking for a highly skilled Senior Video Editor who can confidently take ownership of the entire editing process with minimal supervision.



This role is ideal for someone who is not only experienced in video editing but also embraces modern tools, including AI, to enhance creativity, speed, and production quality.



If you are someone who understands visual storytelling, advanced editing techniques, and emerging AI-powered workflows, this could be the perfect role for you.



What You'll Do

- Produce high-quality video content for marketing, social media, and digital platforms

- Apply advanced editing techniques, motion graphics, and visual storytelling

- Perform color grading, sound design, and final production polish

- Create supporting graphics, text animations, and visual assets when needed

- Conduct your own quality assurance and final review before submission

- Optimize videos for different platforms (YouTube, social media, ads, etc.)

- Use AI-powered tools and workflows to improve editing efficiency, creativity, and production speed

- Manage projects independently and deliver polished work with minimal supervision



What We're Looking For

- Senior-level video editing experience (not entry-level)

- Strong expertise in professional editing tools such as Premiere Pro, After Effects, Final Cut, DaVinci Resolve, or similar software

- Skilled in graphic design, motion graphics, and visual composition

- Comfortable integrating AI tools alongside traditional editing workflows

- Strong understanding of visual storytelling, pacing, and audience engagement

- Ability to work independently and problem-solve creatively

- Detail-oriented with a strong self-QA and review process

- Excellent organization, time management, and reliability



Technical Requirements

- Must have active subscriptions to necessary editing and creative tools required for professional video production

- Reliable high-speed internet and capable editing workstation

- Ability to handle large video files and fast-paced editing environments



What We Value

- Professionals who take ownership of their work

- Creatives who embrace both traditional editing and AI-powered innovation

- Editors who bring ideas, creativity, and solutions - not just execution

- Individuals who are committed to long-term growth and continuous learning



Position Details

- Remote work setup

- Long-term opportunity with a growing team



How to Apply

- Please submit the following:

- Links to previous editing projects

- A short note about your editing workflow and the tools (including AI tools) you currently use

description:

CORE OUTCOME

MUST-HAVES

- Proven project/ops management 

- Very technical & systems-oriented; process/SOP optimizer

- Strong people skills; can coordinate within our team

- ClickUp/Asana/Trello power user; crisp written English



NOT REQUIRED BUT NICE TO HAVES

- Experience with GHL / GoHighLevel & Clickup

- Experience scaling a digital/marketing agency to a large company



WHAT YOU’LL OWN

HOURS

COMPENSATION

- ?50,000–?90,000/month DOE • bi-weekly via Wise/Payoneer • long-term • 13th-month considered



HOW TO APPLY (FOLLOW EXACTLY)

-
 subject: OPS777 – Your Name

Please follow the steps above exactly, especially the AP points and subject or your app won't be considered. 



Thanks for your interest and I look forward to reviewing your application!

title: Collections Support Agent
description:
If you enjoy resolving payment issues, guiding customers through repayment options, and have experience in fintech or Buy Now, Pay Later (BNPL) services, then this role is for you. Apply here: 
/appqyBZJyyxs1htVk/pagvvCsolTY5tzwa7/form

About us

We are a fast-growing fintech team delivering flexible payment solutions, including Buy Now, Pay Later (BNPL) services, that help customers manage their everyday payments with ease. Our team thrives on collaboration, innovation, and a customer-first mindset.

What You’ll Do

As a Customer Operations & Collections Agent, you’ll be the trusted point of contact for our customers - helping them manage their payments, resolve account issues, and stay on track with repayments. You’ll handle everything from contacting customers to settle accounts, guiding them through repayment options, and supporting debt recovery efforts.

IMPORTANT: Please carefully read the responsibilities below to ensure you're a good fit, and follow the instructions on how to apply at the bottom.



Compensation:

* Competitive salary: $1,300 – $1,500 USD per month (depending on experience)

* Opportunity to grow into a Team Lead/Manager position (with a raise) as the support team expands



Benefits:

* 100% Remote - work from anywhere in the Philippines.

* 15 days paid leave

* Bi-weekly salary payouts

* Paid time off and Philippine public holiday, listed here

* Supportive, startup-style culture where your ideas matter

* Clear growth path and strong learning opportunities in fintech





Working Hours:

* Shift during onboarding 6pm - 1am PH, Monday to Friday. After onboarding a fixed schedule will be provided depending on business needs.

* Must be willing to work during weekends

* This is a full time role only (40 hours per week)



Core Responsibilities

* Deliver exceptional multi-channel support (chat,
, and phone) with a focus on first-contact resolution and high customer satisfaction.

* Uphold brand standards by communicating clearly, consistently, and professionally in all interactions.

* Actively manage brand reputation by professionally responding to all customer reviews and public feedback.

* Handle and resolve customer complaints with empathy and efficiency, knowing when and how to appropriately escalate complex issues.

* Oversee customer repayments and collections by assisting with payment management, rescheduling, and account oversight with professionalism and care.

* Protect the business by proactively identifying, investigating, and escalating suspicious activity and potential fraud cases.

* Leverage AI-driven tools to streamline workflows, optimize response times, and enhance the quality of support delivered.

* Drive continuous improvement by gathering and sharing actionable customer insights with product and internal teams to enhance offerings and processes.



You’re Perfect for This Role If You

* Have proven experience in customer service, ideally within fintech, payments, or * lending (BNPL experience a plus).

* Understand fraud detection, repayments, and collections, with empathy for customers’ financial situations.

* Communicate effectively across chat,
, and phone, adapting tone and approach to each channel.

* Are tech-savvy and comfortable using AI tools and automation to streamline work.

* Thrive in a fast-paced, customer-first startup environment where priorities shift quickly.

* Are an empathetic problem solver with strong attention to detail, professionalism, and integrity.



How to Apply:

* Click the link below to submit your application and let's get started: 
/appqyBZJyyxs1htVk/pagvvCsolTY5tzwa7/form

title: Virtual Assistant – Admin & Marketing
description:
Virtual Assistant – Admin & Marketing

Residential Construction Company | Long-Term Role

Company: Will Nelson Constructions Pty Ltd

Location: Jervis Bay, NSW, Australia



About the Company

Will Nelson Constructions is a residential building company based in Jervis Bay, NSW, Australia. We specialise in high-quality residential renovations and construction projects.

As the business continues to grow, we are looking for a reliable, organised, and proactive Virtual Assistant to support both administration and marketing activities within the business.

You will work directly with the company owner and management team, helping streamline operations while assisting with marketing and content that showcases our building projects.

This position will begin as a part-time role 20-30 hours per week hours with the opportunity to grow into full-time employment as the business expands. 

Applicants must be available to work 3–4 hours overlapping with Australian business hours (AEST).



Who We're Looking For

You are someone who enjoys bringing structure and organisation to a growing business.

You are detail-oriented, reliable, and comfortable managing multiple tasks across administration and marketing. You can follow clear processes while also showing initiative when opportunities arise to improve systems or workflows.

You should be proactive, organised, and interested in being part of a growing construction business long term.



Key Responsibilities

Admin & Business Support

• Manage and organise company
 inboxes

• Schedule appointments and maintain calendars

• Perform data entry and maintain organised digital records

• Support general office administration tasks

• Assist with job management systems such as NextMinute

• Support bookkeeping processes including Xero data entry and document management



Marketing & Content

• Design social media posts, stories, reels, brochures, signage, and proposal documents

• Write and schedule captions/posts on Instagram,
 & LinkedIn

• Create highlight reels/montages using project photos

• Maintain consistency with brand voice and image

• Manage social media ads on
 and Instagram 



Project & Systems Support

• Help organise project documentation and records

• Assist with improving internal systems and workflows

• Maintain organised folders for project files, invoices, and documents



Qualifications & Skills Required

• Strong written and spoken English communication skills

• Experience using Microsoft Office or Google Workspace

• Basic Canva design skills

• Experience with social media platforms

• Strong organisational and time-management skills

• Ability to work independently while managing multiple tasks

• High attention to detail



Highly regarded (but not required):

• WordPress experience

• Basic video editing (CapCut or similar)

• Experience with Xero, job management software, or CRM systems

• Experience supporting a construction, trades, or service business



Performance KPIs (First 90 Days)

Area KPI Target

Social Media Schedule 3–5 posts/week across all platforms. 90% brand style compliance.

Design Quality 95?curacy on template use, tone, and formatting by Week 4.

Admin Accuracy 97?curacy in data entry; 24-hr turnaround on simple tasks.

CRM Management 100% of leads logged within 48 hours of contact.

Communication Inbox cleared daily, with follow-ups on all flagged tasks.

Systems Contribution Suggest and implement 2–3 efficiency improvements in the first 60 days.



What We Offer

• Long-term position with a growing Australian construction company

• Part-time role with opportunity to grow into full-time employment

• Flexible working hours

• Paid birthday day off each year

• 13 Month pay

• Direct communication with the business owner

• Opportunity to develop admin, marketing, and content creation skills

• Increased responsibility and income as the company grows



How to Apply

To apply, please send the following:

1. A short 2–3 minute video introducing yourself and explaining why you are interested in this role – Tell me your favourite food also!!

2. A short summary explaining: 

- Which of the listed skills you already have experience with

- Which areas you would require training in

3. As part of your application, include a short Instagram caption promoting a residential renovation project.
